hk_001.title: Mass Arrival of Souls
hk_001.body: A war has just ravaged a mortal kingdom. Thousands of souls are arriving at the gates of your domain.

choices.A: Throw the gates wide open, take them all.
choices.B: Filter harshly, only the most useful get in.
choices.C: Send some back to Earth, let the chaos continue.

hk_002.title: The Generals' Demands
hk_002.body: Your generals are demanding more power and the right to launch their own campaigns of terror.

choices.A: Grant them legions, even if it means losing control.
choices.B: Tighten the chain, everything must go through you.
choices.C: Let them have fun on Earth under supervision.

hk_003.title: Influence Over the Living
hk_003.body: A devoted group wants to spread your influence on Earth. Some demons fear drawing attention.

choices.A: Encourage the cult, power comes first.
choices.B: Limit rituals to isolated places.
choices.C: Dissolve this devoted group before it becomes uncontrollable.

hk_004.title: Traffic Jam at Hell's Gates
hk_004.body: The line of newly damned stretches endlessly. Complaints and files are piling up.

choices.A: Speed up sorting, even if it becomes less accurate.
choices.B: Strengthen procedures, order before all else.
choices.C: Delegate the sorting to an ambitious demon.

hk_005.title: Infernal Court Overloaded
hk_005.body: The infernal judges can no longer keep up. Souls have been waiting far too long for their judgment.

choices.A: Impose daily judgment quotas.
choices.B: Recruit new judges from among the damned.
choices.C: Postpone minor cases, prioritize major criminals.

hk_006.title: Revolt in a Region
hk_006.body: In one region, the damned have disarmed guards and turned the instruments against them.

choices.A: Crush the revolt with additional legions.
choices.B: Negotiate a 'lightening' of punishments in exchange for calm.
choices.C: Make a public example to terrify the other regions.

hk_007.title: Attempted Coup
hk_007.body: A demonic prince is gathering troops and hinting that he would make a better king.

choices.A: Let him think he has your blessing, then strike.
choices.B: Invite him officially, give him a tightly watched role.
choices.C: Ignore the rumor, your legions are enough to deter him.

hk_008.title: Contract with a Mortal King
hk_008.body: A human king wants to sign a pact: in exchange for your help, he promises you his soul and those of his bloodline.

choices.A: Accept and strengthen your influence on Earth.
choices.B: Soften the pact, fewer souls but more lasting.
choices.C: Refuse, that kind of pact draws too much attention from above.

hk_009.title: Inspection by an Archangel
hk_009.body: An archangel comes to observe your kingdom. He says he wants to check that 'balance' is being respected.

choices.A: Hide the chaos and show a disciplined Hell.
choices.B: Proudly display the excesses, it is your kingdom.
choices.C: Guide him to a zone specially decorated for him.

hk_010.title: Soul Escape to Earth
hk_010.body: A crack in an ancient portal lets a few damned souls rise back up to haunt the living.

choices.A: Let them spread fear, you will collect them later.
choices.B: Seal the portal, every soul must stay in its place.
choices.C: Turn the crack into a controlled passage.

hk_011.title: Torturers' Strike
hk_011.body: The torturers are demanding better chains, stable flames, and clearer rules.

choices.A: Give in to some demands to avoid a total shutdown.
choices.B: Crush the strike, no one negotiates with you.
choices.C: Replace the torturers with eager damned souls.

hk_012.title: Black Market of Promises
hk_012.body: A clandestine market is selling and trading promises of damnation between demons and mortals.

choices.A: Legalize and tax this market.
choices.B: Destroy it, contracts must remain under your control.
choices.C: Let it exist as long as it stays discreet.

hk_013.title: Artifact from the Depths
hk_013.body: An artifact so ancient has been found that even you do not know its origin. It pulses with a disturbing energy.

choices.A: Keep it near your throne, under watch.
choices.B: Bury it even deeper.
choices.C: Send it into the world of the living to distract attention.

hk_014.title: Rumor of Returning to Good
hk_014.body: A rumor is spreading: some souls might be able to purify themselves even here. Your advisers are divided.

choices.A: Smother the rumor, Hell is not a spa.
choices.B: Create a special zone to test this 'return to good.'
choices.C: Let it spread, if some souls calm down they will be easier to manage.

hk_015.title: Macabre Games Between Demons
hk_015.body: Demons organize games where they wager souls, legions, and territory on Earth.

choices.A: Ban these games, too dangerous.
choices.B: Supervise them, with you as supreme referee.
choices.C: Join anonymously, to influence the results.

hk_016.title: Festival of Torments
hk_016.body: The demons are demanding a grand festival to celebrate your millennia of rule.

choices.A: Organize a grand spectacle, let all of Hell remember it.
choices.B: Hold a sober ceremony, order comes first.
choices.C: Move the festival near the border of the world of the living.

hk_017.title: Mad Prophet on Earth
hk_017.body: A mortal claims to speak in your name. His speeches are drawing crowds of followers... and enemies.

choices.A: Strengthen his visions, let him ignite the crowds.
choices.B: Tone down his words, he is already dangerous enough.
choices.C: Let him sink into madness without interfering.

hk_018.title: Offer of Heavenly Truce
hk_018.body: A heavenly messenger offers a truce to calm the human world and stabilize the realms.

choices.A: Accept, cosmic order benefits you too.
choices.B: Refuse, Hell does not take orders from anyone.
choices.C: Officially accept but quietly violate the truce.

hk_019.title: Ash Storm
hk_019.body: An ash storm engulfs several regions. Visibility drops, the damned panic.

choices.A: Let the storm run its course, it is the normal landscape.
choices.B: Send legions to restore a semblance of order.
choices.C: Use the chaos to redistribute souls wherever you want.

hk_020.title: New Experimental Region
hk_020.body: One of your architects proposes a new kind of region, more efficient but unstable.

choices.A: Approve the project and open it immediately.
choices.B: Test it on a small number of souls first.
choices.C: Refuse, the current balance is fragile enough already.

hk_021.title: Riot of the Damned Philosophers
hk_021.body: Some damned souls are debating the meaning of eternal punishment and challenging your legitimacy.

choices.A: Silence them by any means necessary.
choices.B: Create a region dedicated to their debates, well isolated.
choices.C: Send them to preach on Earth to muddy beliefs.

hk_022.title: Overzealous Demon Accountant
hk_022.body: A demon in charge of soul records reports inconsistencies and wants to recalculate everything.

choices.A: Let him verify everything, order will come out stronger.
choices.B: Ignore him, no one will ever read all those records.
choices.C: Use his zeal to track down strategic souls.

hk_023.title: Tournament of Legion Chiefs
hk_023.body: The legion commanders want to organize a tournament to prove who deserves more troops.

choices.A: Allow the tournament, with you as final judge.
choices.B: Refuse, legions must obey, not entertain themselves.
choices.C: Allow it, but rig the results in your favor.

hk_024.title: Soul of a Legendary Hero
hk_024.body: The soul of a hero deeply respected by mortals finally descends into your kingdom.

choices.A: Display him as a trophy to inspire fear.
choices.B: Use him as an adviser, he knows humans well.
choices.C: Send him briefly back to Earth as a cursed champion.

hk_025.title: Strange Song in the Depths
hk_025.body: A song echoes from the depths. Even the oldest demons feel uneasy.

choices.A: Investigate personally, surrounded by your guards.
choices.B: Seal the area and declare access forbidden.
choices.C: Let the song spread, and see who answers it.

hk_026.title: Offer from a Forgotten Cult
hk_026.body: An ancient cult, almost gone, wants to return in exchange for a few infernal 'favors.'

choices.A: Accept, even a weak cult is still useful.
choices.B: Refuse, these relics of the past only complicate things.
choices.C: Absorb the cult and completely change its face.

hk_027.title: Contest for the Worst Torture
hk_027.body: The torturers launch a contest to invent the most creative torment.

choices.A: Encourage it, creativity is good for demon morale.
choices.B: Limit the damage, some experiments go too far.
choices.C: Reserve this contest for a very, very isolated region.

hk_028.title: Council of Ancient Demons
hk_028.body: The oldest demons ask for an audience to speak about the future of Hell.

choices.A: Listen to them and integrate some of their ideas.
choices.B: Thank them politely, then continue as before.
choices.C: Divide them by giving them contradictory privileges.

hk_029.title: Embassy from the Neighboring Hells
hk_029.body: A neighboring infernal kingdom proposes an alliance centered on souls, legions, and the human world.

choices.A: Sign an aggressive pact focused on harvesting souls.
choices.B: Negotiate a tightly controlled agreement to keep control.
choices.C: Put your influence on Earth forward, even over your troops.

hk_030.title: Forge of Cursed Weapons
hk_030.body: A demonic forge creates a weapon that makes legions nearly invincible, but unstable.

choices.A: Massively arm your legions with these weapons.
choices.B: Reserve these weapons for a few elite units.
choices.C: Limit their production, discipline comes first.

hk_031.title: Unauthorized Portals
hk_031.body: Demons have opened portals to Earth. The worlds above are beginning to notice.

choices.A: Expand these portals, the opportunity is too good.
choices.B: Close them cleanly, imposing strict rules.
choices.C: Keep only a few in discreet areas.

hk_032.title: Duels Between Champions
hk_032.body: Your best champions keep fighting to win your attention and more power.

choices.A: Favor the most brutal demons.
choices.B: Reward the most cunning souls.
choices.C: Set up a code of honor to regulate the duels.

hk_033.title: Infernal City on Earth
hk_033.body: A mortal district is looking more and more like an annex of Hell.

choices.A: Turn it into a true infernal stronghold.
choices.B: Focus mainly on discreetly collecting precious souls.
choices.C: Arm a few legions to control this urban chaos.

hk_034.title: Lottery of the Damned
hk_034.body: A lottery lets the damned trade favors for a lighter torment.

choices.A: Encourage this system, it draws in many souls.
choices.B: Turn it into a strict control tool.
choices.C: Hand it over to your legions so they can profit from it.

hk_035.title: Tower of Confessions
hk_035.body: The damned confess their secrets in a tower. These confessions may be useful to you.

choices.A: Use these confessions to tighten your hold on those souls.
choices.B: Exploit certain secrets to influence the world of the living.
choices.C: Archive these records to improve infernal order.

hk_036.title: War of Torture Styles
hk_036.body: Two schools of torture are clashing. Their rivalry is becoming dangerous.

choices.A: Support the brutal school, useful to your legions.
choices.B: Support the refined school, more compatible with order.
choices.C: Let them compete, and feed both sides.

hk_037.title: Exporting Nightmares
hk_037.body: A service wants to send more nightmares to mortals to prepare their souls to join you.

choices.A: Flood their nights with infernal visions.
choices.B: Target mainly human leaders and rulers.
choices.C: Calibrate the nightmares to maintain balance.

hk_038.title: Revolt of the Infernal Scribes
hk_038.body: The scribes who record sins, pacts, and torments say they are ignored despite their essential role.

choices.A: Reward them with more military power.
choices.B: Integrate them more deeply into the chain of command.
choices.C: Praise them publicly, without too many concessions.

hk_039.title: Collapsed Temple on Earth
hk_039.body: An ancient temple of your cult has collapsed. Some see it as a sign, others as a simple ruin.

choices.A: Strengthen the discreet presence of your agents in the area.
choices.B: Use the event to attract new souls.
choices.C: Turn the site into a more structured anchor point.

hk_040.title: Infernal Strategic Council
hk_040.body: Your advisers want you to prioritize souls, armies, order, or the human world.

choices.A: Give a little more to everyone, even if it weakens order.
choices.B: Impose order as the priority, even if you lose souls.
choices.C: Invest in the human world, your future playground.

hk_041.title: Exhibition of the Deadly Sins
hk_041.body: A grand exhibition is proposed where each deadly sin would have its own place.

choices.A: Focus on luring souls at any cost.
choices.B: Structure the event like a tightly controlled fair.
choices.C: Make it mainly a showcase for your elite troops.

hk_042.title: Infernal Military Academy
hk_042.body: Your generals want to create an official academy to train future legion commanders.

choices.A: Put the emphasis on brute strength and fear.
choices.B: Value loyalty and discipline above all else.
choices.C: Include courses on manipulating mortals.

hk_043.title: Great Infernal Eclipse
hk_043.body: A rare eclipse darkens Hell and Earth. The boundaries between worlds grow weaker.

choices.A: Take advantage of it to push more souls toward you.
choices.B: Reinforce the barriers to prevent escapes.
choices.C: Let your demons infiltrate the dreams of mortals.

hk_044.title: New Infernal Code
hk_044.body: Your jurists want to completely rewrite the Code of Punishments to adapt it to modern vices.

choices.A: Create a more merciless Code for souls.
choices.B: Include the demands of certain generals.
choices.C: Insist on clear and efficient rules.

hk_045.title: Grand Council of Tempters
hk_045.body: The tempters working in the human world want a greater voice in the overall strategy.

choices.A: Give them more freedom to harvest souls.
choices.B: Integrate them into a stricter hierarchy.
choices.C: Force them to coordinate their actions with the legions.

hk_046.title: Epidemic of Infernal Fatigue
hk_046.body: Even some demons seem tired of punishing the same sins for centuries.

choices.A: Replace them with fresher recruits.
choices.B: Organize war campaigns to wake them up.
choices.C: Redesign certain regions to vary the pleasures.

hk_047.title: Tower of Distorted Screams
hk_047.body: A tower amplifies the screams of the damned. Now their echoes disturb even your soldiers.

choices.A: Redirect those screams toward the world of the living to spread fear.
choices.B: Isolate the tower in a heavily controlled zone.
choices.C: Use those echoes to mentally train your legions.

hk_048.title: Market of Damned Illusions
hk_048.body: A market offers the damned false past lives in exchange for many more years of torment.

choices.A: Encourage this market, it quickly fills your reserves.
choices.B: Regulate the contracts to keep a minimum of order.
choices.C: Reserve certain illusions for the most useful to your plans.

hk_049.title: Conquest Game Between Demons
hk_049.body: A strategy game circulating among demons simulates the conquest of new lands on the surface.

choices.A: Turn it into an official tool for choosing campaigns.
choices.B: Limit it to training a few officers.
choices.C: Let demons play freely, without too much oversight.

hk_050.title: Prophecy Carved in Lava
hk_050.body: Words in the lava announce the fall of a 'king of flames' if balance breaks too badly.

choices.A: Ignore the prophecy and accelerate damnation even more.
choices.B: Strengthen order to avoid a brutal collapse.
choices.C: Spread the chaos between the world of the living, the legions, and the souls.

hk_051.title: Tunnel to an Ancient Hell
hk_051.body: Demonic miners have opened a passage to a very ancient zone, abandoned for a long time.

choices.A: Immediately send new souls there to exploit it.
choices.B: Explore it cautiously with a disciplined force.
choices.C: Use it as a secret base for operations on Earth.

hk_052.title: Conspiracy of the Archivists
hk_052.body: The archivists of pacts and sins threaten to reveal the management failures of certain generals.

choices.A: Protect your secrets by feeding them souls.
choices.B: Put these archives under strict military control.
choices.C: Let a few scandals leak out to rebalance power.

hk_053.title: Spark Storms on Earth
hk_053.body: Showers of sparks fall on Earth and inflame conflicts in certain places.

choices.A: Intensify those showers to harvest more souls.
choices.B: Limit their frequency so as not to attract too much attention.
choices.C: Channel them toward areas already unstable.

hk_054.title: Reform of the Sacred Chains
hk_054.body: There is a plan to replace the old chains with bonds based on promises and regrets.

choices.A: Focus the reform on the number of chained souls.
choices.B: Prioritize solidity and control of the flow.
choices.C: Test these chains mainly on certain mortal leaders.

hk_055.title: Carnival of Illusions
hk_055.body: Troops of demon illusionists want to organize a permanent carnival in a specific region.

choices.A: Turn it into an irresistible soul trap.
choices.B: Integrate it into the general order as an experimental zone.
choices.C: Link it to certain places on the surface on special nights.

hk_056.title: Flooding River of Blood
hk_056.body: One of the great rivers of blood is overflowing and threatening several major installations.

choices.A: Channel the flood toward overcrowded regions.
choices.B: Build infernal dikes with your disciplined units.
choices.C: Let the river redraw the infernal landscape.

hk_057.title: Contest of Corruption on Earth
hk_057.body: Demons challenge each other: corrupt increasingly influential public figures.

choices.A: Reward the massive harvesting of souls.
choices.B: Demand a more targeted and controlled approach.
choices.C: Value spectacular operations on the surface.

hk_058.title: Tower Watching the Worlds
hk_058.body: A tower allows you to observe the dreams, wars, and prayers of mortals in real time.

choices.A: Use these visions to trap even more souls.
choices.B: Use them to precisely adjust your internal order.
choices.C: Give access to certain carefully chosen commanders.

hk_059.title: Cult of the King of Hell
hk_059.body: Some demons are beginning to worship you as a deity and demand rituals in your honor.

choices.A: Encourage this cult, even if it feeds excess.
choices.B: Structure it within a clearly defined hierarchy.
choices.C: Tolerate it on the surface only, as a political instrument.

hk_060.title: Unknown Voice in the Tunnels
hk_060.body: Patrols hear a voice whispering secrets about the flaws in your reign.

choices.A: Send groups of condemned souls to investigate.
choices.B: Assign disciplined legions to secure the area.
choices.C: Quietly exploit these whispers to adjust your strategy.

hk_061.title: Laboratory of New Sins
hk_061.body: An experimental region is trying to invent forms of vice suited to the modern age.

choices.A: Test these innovations on as many mortals as possible.
choices.B: Integrate them into a strictly controlled protocol.
choices.C: Only spread the most effective ones to the surface.

hk_062.title: Great Infernal Games
hk_062.body: Macabre games pit the damned, demons, and sometimes a few hero souls against one another.

choices.A: Aim them toward massive soul collection.
choices.B: Make them a training tool for your legions.
choices.C: Tie them to the surface to strengthen your influence.

hk_063.title: Revolt of an Autonomous Region
hk_063.body: One region has started governing itself without sending up the usual reports.

choices.A: Flood it with new souls to regain control.
choices.B: Send a disciplined force to restore central authority.
choices.C: Observe first, to see whether the model can be used elsewhere.

hk_064.title: Library of Beliefs
hk_064.body: A library gathers the texts, prayers, and betrayed hopes of mortals.

choices.A: Turn it into a psychological weapon to torment more deeply.
choices.B: Organize it to improve the overall management of souls.
choices.C: Use it to refine operations on the surface.

hk_065.title: Crisis with another realm
hk_065.body: A neighboring realm, neither fully heavenly nor fully infernal, protests against your incursions.

choices.A: Answer with a brutal show of force.
choices.B: Negotiate borders and precise rules.
choices.C: Redirect the conflict toward areas on the surface.

hk_066.title: Contest of Lost Souls
hk_066.body: Your torturers are fighting over the title of 'worst case' ever handled.

choices.A: Intensify the punishments to harvest more energy.
choices.B: Impose a strict framework, even in horror.
choices.C: Use these cases as examples to frighten the living.

hk_067.title: Festival of Demonic Masks
hk_067.body: A festival where demons and the damned wear masks representing their sins and ambitions.

choices.A: Turn this festival into a vast trap for new souls.
choices.B: Structure it as a ritual of order and hierarchy.
choices.C: Symbolically connect it to certain surface cults.

hk_068.title: Agreement with a Forgotten Deity
hk_068.body: A deity almost erased from the world of mortals seeks refuge and influence in your domain.

choices.A: Use it to attract a flood of nostalgic souls.
choices.B: Integrate it into your order as a tightly watched vassal.
choices.C: Send it to act discreetly in the world of the living.

hk_069.title: Colossus of Ash
hk_069.body: A massive colossus of ash has appeared in an infernal desert and is drawing every eye.

choices.A: Feed it souls to turn it into a weapon.
choices.B: Chain it and integrate it into the controlled landscape.
choices.C: Bind it to certain places on the surface as a living symbol.

hk_070.title: Assembly of a Thousand Whispers
hk_070.body: Thousands of damned voices whisper your name and debate every decision you make.

choices.A: Exploit this chorus to probe the mass of souls.
choices.B: Channel these whispers into an advisory structure.
choices.C: Let these voices reach the world of the living and disturb dreamers.

hk_071.title: Congress of Famous Sinners
hk_071.body: Several famous souls end up in the same region and demand elite treatment.

choices.A: Display them as trophies to attract more souls.
choices.B: Subject them to the same rules as everyone else.
choices.C: Use them to discreetly influence the surface.

hk_072.title: Border Maneuvers
hk_072.body: Your legions train near the borders of your realm, worrying neighboring realms.

choices.A: Turn the exercise into a real show of strength.
choices.B: Offer official reassurance while keeping the training going.
choices.C: Move some of the troops toward earthly targets.

hk_073.title: Region of the Defilers
hk_073.body: One region is inventing new forms of desecration. Their ideas could help or throw everything into chaos.

choices.A: Exploit their inventiveness to attract more souls.
choices.B: Strictly isolate them to preserve order.
choices.C: Let some of their ideas leak to the surface.

hk_074.title: Court of Refined Torments
hk_074.body: A court of torment artisans offers highly elaborate punishments.

choices.A: Push the number of processed souls to the maximum.
choices.B: Establish a rigid protocol for each torment.
choices.C: Reserve these refinements for influential targets on Earth.

hk_075.title: Wrath of a Legendary General
hk_075.body: A legendary general, feared by all, openly criticizes your rule.

choices.A: Put him back in his place with a massive flood of souls to manage.
choices.B: Promote him into a more tightly controlled role.
choices.C: Send him to lead a very risky campaign on the surface.

hk_076.title: Endless Inventories of Sin
hk_076.body: The scribes complain: every day, new sins pile up faster than the records.

choices.A: Push them to record everything, even at the cost of chaos.
choices.B: Simplify the categories to keep the whole system under control.
choices.C: Record in detail only the key sins committed among the living.

hk_077.title: Pilgrimage of Repentant Damned
hk_077.body: A group of damned souls attempts an improvised 'pilgrimage' to ask for a reduction in their punishments.

choices.A: Punish them harshly and make an example of them.
choices.B: Create a fake ritual of returning to good, heavily controlled.
choices.C: Send them briefly back to the surface, marked forever.

hk_078.title: Contest of Harmonized Screams
hk_078.body: Torturers are organizing a contest to turn screams into almost musical choruses.

choices.A: Encourage it to attract more curious souls.
choices.B: Place the contest under strict rules.
choices.C: Broadcast these 'songs' into the nightmares of mortals.

hk_079.title: Region of Broken Pacts
hk_079.body: An entire region is populated by those who betrayed their pacts, infernal or otherwise.

choices.A: Exploit them for confessions and secrets.
choices.B: Strengthen the structure of their punishments as an example.
choices.C: Send some of them to sow discord on Earth.

hk_080.title: Visit from a Former Dethroned King
hk_080.body: A former king of Hell, fallen long ago, returns to see you and comment on your reign.

choices.A: Use him to justify intensifying damnations.
choices.B: Integrate him as an adviser under heavy surveillance.
choices.C: Send him to inspect zones near the surface.

hk_081.title: School of Modern Temptations
hk_081.body: A school wants to train demons who are experts in networks, screens, and new addictions.

choices.A: Focus on the volume of souls harvested.
choices.B: Heavily regulate the methods to keep control.
choices.C: Target places of power on the surface first.

hk_082.title: Regions in Rivalry
hk_082.body: Two regions boast of being the most infernal and fight over resources.

choices.A: Feed both of them with even more souls.
choices.B: Impose a clear hierarchy between them.
choices.C: Give each a different mission on the surface.

hk_083.title: Appearance of a Rift
hk_083.body: A glowing rift opens at the bottom of an abyss. Some see it as an intrusion from above.

choices.A: Flood it with souls to saturate it.
choices.B: Send disciplined legions to control it.
choices.C: Direct part of the flow toward specific places on Earth.

hk_084.title: Tower of Inverted Meditation
hk_084.body: A tower where the damned do not meditate to find peace, but to brood over their sins.

choices.A: Increase the number of souls admitted into this tower.
choices.B: Structure its operation like an infernal monastery.
choices.C: Use this brooding to guide your temptations on Earth.

hk_085.title: Parade of Infernal Beasts
hk_085.body: Your most monstrous creatures parade through the hallways among terrified damned souls.

choices.A: Make it a regular spectacle to crush all resistance.
choices.B: Put the parade under a strict security protocol.
choices.C: Send a few beasts prowling along the borders of the surface.

hk_086.title: Night of Inverted Flames
hk_086.body: A strange night when flames burn backward, from the ground toward the sky, destabilizes everyone.

choices.A: Let this phenomenon attract as many souls as possible.
choices.B: Control and map every affected zone.
choices.C: Synchronize this night with certain surface rituals.

hk_087.title: Meeting of the Torture Masters
hk_087.body: The masters of torture want to be consulted on overall strategy.

choices.A: Grant them more souls to manage.
choices.B: Integrate them into a heavily hierarchical council.
choices.C: Assign them specific targets on the surface.

hk_088.title: Breach to a Minor Hell
hk_088.body: A breach leads to a poorly organized local hell that crudely imitates yours.

choices.A: Steal its souls and absorb it.
choices.B: Restructure it and integrate it into your order.
choices.C: Use it as a pivot base for incursions on Earth.

hk_089.title: Procession of Broken Masks
hk_089.body: A procession of the damned wearing cracked masks moves through several regions.

choices.A: Draw even more souls in search of spectacle.
choices.B: Turn this procession into a highly codified ritual.
choices.C: Use it as a symbol in certain surface cults.

hk_090.title: Festival of Red Ash
hk_090.body: A rain of red ash falls over your whole kingdom. Some see it as an omen.

choices.A: Proclaim a great hunt for souls.
choices.B: Turn it into a ceremony of order and inverted purification.
choices.C: Link this festival to specific events on Earth.

hk_091.title: Rebellion of the Overseers
hk_091.body: Those who guard the bridges between regions demand more recognition.

choices.A: Stuff them with new souls to filter.
choices.B: Strictly clarify their rights and duties.
choices.C: Assign them to watch the passages to the surface as well.

hk_092.title: Tower of Impossible Oaths
hk_092.body: A tower where the damned are forced to swear what they will never be able to keep.

choices.A: Multiply these oaths to trap more souls.
choices.B: Index every oath in a highly ordered system.
choices.C: Export some of these oaths into surface pacts.

hk_093.title: Fields of Ash Statues
hk_093.body: In these fields, broken souls are frozen into ash statues, lined up like a warning.

choices.A: Break them apart in massive numbers to feed your kingdom.
choices.B: Catalog them and watch them under strict rules.
choices.C: Make a few of them appear silently among the living.

hk_094.title: Assembly of Flaming Tongues
hk_094.body: Tongues of fire whisper the worst secrets of the living and the dead.

choices.A: Flood your regions with these revelations to break souls.
choices.B: Classify them as strategic information.
choices.C: Leak some of them into influential ears on Earth.

hk_095.title: Court of Refined Pacts
hk_095.body: A court specializes in extremely detailed pacts, almost legal in nature.

choices.A: Maximize the number of souls involved.
choices.B: Make it a pillar of infernal order.
choices.C: Use these pacts as tools of political influence on the surface.

hk_096.title: Lake of Burning Glass
hk_096.body: A lake of liquefied glass reflects the worst memories of the damned and certain demons.

choices.A: Throw as many souls into it as possible.
choices.B: Map these reflections to better organize punishments.
choices.C: Show images of the surface there to influence your decisions.

hk_097.title: Grand Council of Mad Laughter
hk_097.body: A group of demons no longer takes anything seriously and turns every torment into a cruel joke.

choices.A: Let them attract souls through the grotesque.
choices.B: Restore a strict protocol in their domains.
choices.C: Send them to destabilize certain places on Earth.

hk_098.title: Night of Inverted Mirrors
hk_098.body: Mirrors show how small faults eventually lead to great condemnations.

choices.A: Exploit these visions to deepen the pain.
choices.B: Carefully store these mirrors in codified rooms.
choices.C: Project certain reflections into the dreams of mortals.

hk_099.title: Demonic Promotion
hk_099.body: Your demons are asking for a clear promotion system, with ranks, privileges, and titles.

choices.A: Value those who bring back the most souls.
choices.B: Base promotion on obedience and order.
choices.C: Especially reward those who act on the surface.

hk_100.title: Great Infernal Census
hk_100.body: A full census of souls, legions, structures, and influences in the human world is proposed to you.

choices.A: Focus the census on the mass of souls.
choices.B: Make it a tool of absolute order and control.
choices.C: Use it mainly to plan campaigns on Earth.

hk_101.title: Bank of the Damned
hk_101.body: An infernal bank wants to lend fragments of soul in exchange for short-term favors.

choices.A: Encourage these loans to swell your soul reserves.
choices.B: Regulate them harshly to avoid chaos.
choices.C: Use these contracts to fund operations on the surface.

hk_102.title: Mass Recruitment Campaign
hk_102.body: Your generals launch a campaign to recruit new legions from the most violent damned souls.

choices.A: Accept all volunteers, even unstable ones.
choices.B: Take only the fiercest and most disciplined.
choices.C: Pull certain profiles for missions on Earth.

hk_103.title: Black Market of Relics
hk_103.body: Relics stolen from the surface are circulating through an infernal black market.

choices.A: Flood the market to attract more corrupted souls.
choices.B: Confiscate and inventory every relic.
choices.C: Send a few cursed relics back to the surface.

hk_104.title: College of Infernal Strategists
hk_104.body: A college of strategists proposes precise plans for war, corruption, and order.

choices.A: Assign them to maximize soul collection.
choices.B: Integrate them into a strict chain of command.
choices.C: Direct part of their plans toward the surface.

hk_105.title: Procession of Forgotten Kings
hk_105.body: Ancient fallen mortal kings march before your throne, demanding a special status.

choices.A: Display them to attract ambitious souls.
choices.B: Place them back into a rigid protocol of punishments.
choices.C: Send some of them to influence their former lands.

hk_106.title: Contest of Innovative Torments
hk_106.body: Your torturers launch a contest to create torments suited to modern vices.

choices.A: Reward the torments most profitable in souls.
choices.B: Standardize each technique in an official manual.
choices.C: Reserve the most creative ones for the elites on the surface.

hk_107.title: A Growing Conflict Between Two Regions
hk_107.body: Two regions accuse each other of stealing their damned and their guards.

choices.A: Feed them both souls to ease the tension... temporarily.
choices.B: Send an elite legion to restore order.
choices.C: Channel their rivalry toward the conquest of the surface.

hk_108.title: Rumor of a Gentler Hell
hk_108.body: A rumor spreads: somewhere there is said to be a more 'bearable' hell.

choices.A: Let the rumor spread, a source of despair.
choices.B: Identify and crush any organized escape attempt.
choices.C: Use this legend to lure certain mortals.

hk_109.title: Tower of Military Echoes
hk_109.body: A tower echoes back the screams and orders of your legions.

choices.A: Amplify these echoes to galvanize souls.
choices.B: Put the tower under a strict military protocol.
choices.C: Use it to coordinate assaults on the surface.

hk_110.title: Hall of Impossible Contracts
hk_110.body: A grand hall attracts mortals and the damned with contracts no sane being would ever accept.

choices.A: Sign in bulk to rake in souls.
choices.B: Filter agreements to keep a readable order.
choices.C: Reserve certain clauses for the powerful on the surface.

hk_111.title: Mutiny on a Bridge of the Damned
hk_111.body: A bridge linking two regions has been seized by mutinous damned.

choices.A: Drown them under a flood of additional souls.
choices.B: Send a disciplined force to take back control.
choices.C: Turn this bridge into an observation post over the surface.

hk_112.title: Calendar of Abominations
hk_112.body: A calendar of 'great abominations' to celebrate each infernal year is proposed to you.

choices.A: Align those dates with peaks of damnation.
choices.B: Structure this calendar as the basis of order.
choices.C: Synchronize some dates with the surface.

hk_113.title: Abyss of Moving Shadows
hk_113.body: An abyss spews shadows that imitate living mortals.

choices.A: Throw souls into it to feed these shadows.
choices.B: Place the abyss under strict military surveillance.
choices.C: Send these shadows to project fear on the surface.

hk_114.title: Cult of the Silent Flame
hk_114.body: A new cult worships a flame that does not burn but consumes willpower.

choices.A: Let the flame devour as many souls as possible.
choices.B: Integrate it into a very structured official ritual.
choices.C: Connect this cult to human sects.

hk_115.title: School of Infernal Mentors
hk_115.body: A school trains “mentors” specialized in the slow corruption of minds.

choices.A: Measure their success by the number of souls.
choices.B: Above all, assess their discipline and obedience.
choices.C: Assign them to key figures on the surface.

hk_116.title: River of Torn Memories
hk_116.body: A river carries the darkest memories of the damned.

choices.A: Throw even more souls into it.
choices.B: Sort these memories into archives to maintain order more effectively.
choices.C: Use these memories to guide the corruption of the living.

hk_117.title: Miniature Game of Thrones
hk_117.body: Demons have built a model of your throne and reenact your decisions in miniature.

choices.A: Encourage this game to strengthen your aura.
choices.B: Impose strict rules: nothing must escape you.
choices.C: Turn it into a simulation of surface reactions.

hk_118.title: Pillar of Broken Chains
hk_118.body: A pillar of broken chains gathers the pacts and oaths that were broken.

choices.A: Bind more souls to it to inspire terror.
choices.B: Organize these chains according to a rigorous record.
choices.C: Use it to weaken certain contracts on Earth.

hk_119.title: Rain of Embers on the Nobles
hk_119.body: A rain of embers falls only on the areas reserved for influential damned souls.

choices.A: Multiply these rains to break their pride.
choices.B: Establish a precise schedule for these punishments.
choices.C: Tie these events to certain scandals on the surface.

hk_120.title: Grand Council of Illusionists
hk_120.body: The master illusionists demand a greater role in your reign.

choices.A: Let them manipulate mass perception.
choices.B: Keep them in line through a clear hierarchy.
choices.C: Send them to sow doubt in the dreams of the living.

hk_121.title: Camp of Refugee Souls
hk_121.body: A makeshift camp of souls presents itself as a refuge from other worlds.

choices.A: Absorb them en masse into your system.
choices.B: Place them under a strictly codified regime.
choices.C: Use them as bargaining chips in your dealings with the living.

hk_122.title: Market of Counterfeit Memories
hk_122.body: A market sells the damned memories that do not belong to them.

choices.A: Use the confusion to gather more souls.
choices.B: Standardize these exchanges to avoid excesses.
choices.C: Export some false memories to influence susceptible mortals.

hk_123.title: Eruption of a Volcano of Bones
hk_123.body: A volcano made of bones and skulls awakens.

choices.A: Feed it souls to amplify its power.
choices.B: Channel it into an infernal urban planning scheme.
choices.C: Bind its wrath to certain places on the surface.

hk_124.title: Court of Torments
hk_124.body: A court specializes in endless bureaucratic torments.

choices.A: Send a massive flow of new souls there.
choices.B: Make it a centerpiece of your internal order.
choices.C: Use this model to inspire human administrations.

hk_125.title: Delegation of Fanatical Devotees
hk_125.body: The souls of extreme devotees want to prove they deserve special treatment.

choices.A: Use them as a showcase to attract other believers.
choices.B: Integrate them into a region with very strict rules.
choices.C: Turn them against the religious structures on the surface.

hk_126.title: Labyrinth of Black Glass
hk_126.body: A labyrinth of black glass reflects the worst possible choices of every soul.

choices.A: Throw even more souls into this labyrinth.
choices.B: Map the paths to keep total control.
choices.C: Project certain visions toward human decision-makers.

hk_127.title: Traitor in Your Ranks
hk_127.body: Whispers say a high-ranking demon is preparing a coup.

choices.A: Darken the rumor by punishing innocents.
choices.B: Launch a secret, hierarchical investigation.
choices.C: Use the rumor to trigger a targeted purge within your own ranks.

hk_128.title: Lottery of Failed Resurrections
hk_128.body: Some damned souls hope for a second chance to return alive.

choices.A: Sell false hope in exchange for souls.
choices.B: Create a heavily controlled pseudo-official protocol.
choices.C: Carry out a few spectacular returns to frighten mortals.

hk_129.title: Field of Hanging Cages
hk_129.body: Hanging cages hold souls that endlessly accuse one another.

choices.A: Increase the number of cages to obtain more confessions.
choices.B: Regulate this field to avoid overflow.
choices.C: Use these accusations to manipulate the living.

hk_130.title: Poisoned Banquet
hk_130.body: A proposal is made to organize a banquet where everything is an illusion... except the poisons.

choices.A: Invite as many influential souls as possible.
choices.B: Turn it into a rare, highly codified ritual.
choices.C: Link it to mortal celebrations through dreams and hallucinations.

hk_131.title: Misty Bridge to Earth
hk_131.body: A bridge of mist appears, briefly linking your kingdom to a precise place in the world of the living.

choices.A: Let souls pour across this bridge.
choices.B: Secure every crossing with strict guards.
choices.C: Send a small elite force to explore the location.

hk_132.title: Secondary Throne of Illusions
hk_132.body: A secondary throne allows simulations of different versions of your reign.

choices.A: Test scenarios that maximize souls.
choices.B: Test scenarios that maximize order.
choices.C: Test scenarios centered on the surface.

hk_133.title: Arena of Pride Duels
hk_133.body: An arena sees souls who cannot renounce their pride battle one another.

choices.A: Fuel these duels to break even more souls.
choices.B: Regulate the arena like a court of pride.
choices.C: Select certain winners for earthly missions.

hk_134.title: Cemetery of Promises
hk_134.body: Each grave bears the name of a betrayed promise.

choices.A: Bury even more broken souls there.
choices.B: Sort each promise to control the whole system more effectively.
choices.C: Bring some of these promises back among the living.

hk_135.title: Rain of Burned Feathers
hk_135.body: Charred feathers fall, remnants of defeated creatures from above.

choices.A: Turn it into a sign of victory to attract souls.
choices.B: Store them in inverted sacred archives.
choices.C: Let a few fall onto the surface.

hk_136.title: Council of Grumbling Judges
hk_136.body: A council of judges demands more authority in verdicts.

choices.A: Measure their efficiency by the mass of souls judged.
choices.B: Place them in a rigid hierarchy under your gaze.
choices.C: Charge them with judging certain human actions as well.

hk_137.title: Tower of Inverted Clocks
hk_137.body: Clocks turn backward and alter the perception of time.

choices.A: Plunge more souls into this confusion.
choices.B: Synchronize these clocks with your internal order.
choices.C: Let this strange time leak into mortal nights.

hk_138.title: Hall of Royal Masks
hk_138.body: A hall preserves the faces of all your predecessors.

choices.A: Display them to inspire fear and attract souls.
choices.B: Classify them according to the rules of the old kings.
choices.C: Project these faces into the dreams of certain living kings.

hk_139.title: Fair of Inverted Miracles
hk_139.body: A fair offers 'miracles' that always make the situation worse.

choices.A: Let souls rush toward it.
choices.B: Limit the booths to keep control.
choices.C: Connect this fair to charlatans on the surface.

hk_140.title: Endless Stairs
hk_140.body: An endless staircase forces the damned to climb or descend without purpose.

choices.A: Increase the flow of souls trapped inside it.
choices.B: Map every landing in your records.
choices.C: Make human insomniacs feel those steps.

hk_141.title: Credit of Suffering
hk_141.body: A 'credit of suffering' is proposed to you: suffer more now to suffer less later.

choices.A: Launch this system to collect as many souls as possible.
choices.B: Frame it with rules impossible to satisfy.
choices.C: Sell this idea to certain gurus on the surface.

hk_142.title: Theater of Alternative Lives
hk_142.body: A theater performs what the damned could have become if they had made different choices.

choices.A: Force souls to attend these plays.
choices.B: Organize a full repertoire classified by type of sin.
choices.C: Project fragments of these plays into the dreams of the living.

hk_143.title: Assembly of Tired Scribes
hk_143.body: The scribes say that even Hell generates too much paperwork.

choices.A: Burden them with even more souls to manage.
choices.B: Simplify certain protocols to preserve order.
choices.C: Delegate part of their workload to human bureaucrats.

hk_144.title: Festival of Singing Embers
hk_144.body: Embers sing distorted hymns through the corridors.

choices.A: Let their song attract fascinated souls.
choices.B: Set precise hours and places for this festival.
choices.C: Echo these songs in places of worship on Earth.

hk_145.title: Greenhouse of Soul Plants
hk_145.body: A greenhouse grows strange plants fed by the energy of souls.

choices.A: Increase their numbers to speed up harvesting.
choices.B: Organize this greenhouse like a model institution.
choices.C: Bind these plants to certain cursed places on the surface.

hk_146.title: Tournament of Perfect Lies
hk_146.body: A tournament rewards the most destructive lie.

choices.A: Reward above all the lies that bring down the most souls.
choices.B: Record every lie in a codified register.
choices.C: Test these lies across the networks of the living.

hk_147.title: Crack Toward a Sea of Acid
hk_147.body: A sea of infernal acid threatens to swallow an entire region.

choices.A: Throw more souls into it to inspire fear.
choices.B: Build dikes with extremely controlled materials.
choices.C: Use this sea to haunt the minds of certain mortals.

hk_148.title: Crypt of Unconfessed Secrets
hk_148.body: A crypt contains everything the living and the dead never dared confess.

choices.A: Throw souls into it to break them.
choices.B: Sort these secrets so you can use them later.
choices.C: Let a few of them leak out to trigger scandals on Earth.

hk_149.title: Hall of Rival Thrones
hk_149.body: Several empty thrones seem to be waiting for other kings of Hell.

choices.A: Use them as threats to subdue souls.
choices.B: Integrate them into the rules of the old kings.
choices.C: Present them as visions to certain mortal tyrants.

hk_150.title: Inventory of Parallel Hells
hk_150.body: A proposal is made to count the parallel, rival, or barely formed hells.

choices.A: Measure above all how many souls you can absorb.
choices.B: Turn it into a tool to monitor and contain the other infernal realms.
choices.C: Use this information to prepare an expansion onto Earth.

hk_151.title: Northern Border in Flames
hk_151.body: Rumors speak of an infernal 'North' beginning to encroach on your territories.

choices.A: Send legions to test their defenses.
choices.B: Observe from afar to avoid breaking order.
choices.C: Spread these rumors to the surface to sow fear.

hk_152.title: Ambassador from the North
hk_152.body: An emissary from a northern infernal kingdom asks to see you.

choices.A: Receive him with great pomp to attract his souls.
choices.B: Subject him to a strict and humiliating etiquette.
choices.C: Offer him a secret alliance aimed at the surface.

hk_153.title: Offer to Share the Damned
hk_153.body: The North offers a treaty: split certain categories of damned souls equally.

choices.A: Accept to temporarily swell your stocks.
choices.B: Refuse and strengthen your own records.
choices.C: Officially accept but divert some toward the surface.

hk_154.title: Frozen Spies
hk_154.body: Your spies report that the North is experimenting with unusual frozen punishments.

choices.A: Poach their torturers for your legions.
choices.B: File these new methods in your manual of torments.
choices.C: Test these horrors on a few souls from the surface.

hk_155.title: Accusation of Usurpation
hk_155.body: A lord of the North accuses you of stealing an ancient forgotten title.

choices.A: Answer with a display of infernal power.
choices.B: Demand an infernal trial under strict rules.
choices.C: Turn the accusation back by revealing his mortal contacts.

hk_156.title: Breach in the Infernal Glacier
hk_156.body: A glacier of suffering in the North cracks open, letting screams escape.

choices.A: Send your legions to recover what comes out.
choices.B: Draft an emergency protocol to contain the breach.
choices.C: Open an indirect path toward cold regions on the surface.

hk_157.title: Trafficking in Frozen Souls
hk_157.body: You are told of a trafficking ring in frozen souls moving through your regions.

choices.A: Take your cut and look the other way.
choices.B: Regulate the traffic and record every transaction.
choices.C: Let part of the trade flow back to the world of the living.

hk_158.title: Colossus of Living Ice
hk_158.body: A colossus of ice animated by chained souls is heading toward your borders.

choices.A: Destroy it with a shock force.
choices.B: Imprison them in a dedicated region under heavy surveillance.
choices.C: Divert this colossus to frighten a few mortal cities.

hk_159.title: Non-Aggression Oath
hk_159.body: The North sends you a non-aggression pact written in ice.

choices.A: Sign it so you can focus on other sources of souls.
choices.B: Refuse and reinforce your borders.
choices.C: Sign it, but use the respite to infiltrate the surface.

hk_160.title: Summons to the Grand Council
hk_160.body: Several infernal kingdoms, including the North, call for an exceptional grand council.

choices.A: Send an impressive martial delegation.
choices.B: Go only with your harshest administrators.
choices.C: Use the grand council to forge alliances on Earth.

hk_161.title: War of Infernal Chants
hk_161.body: War hymns from the North are competing with those of your own legions.

choices.A: Compose songs even more terrifying.
choices.B: Ban any chant not approved by your order.
choices.C: Echo these hymns in the nightmares of the living.

hk_162.title: Bridge of Black Crystal
hk_162.body: A bridge of black crystal briefly links your kingdom to a fortress of the North.

choices.A: Send your best legions to test their resistance.
choices.B: Tightly control every crossing on this bridge.
choices.C: Use this bridge to spy on their contacts on the surface.

hk_163.title: Division of Heresies
hk_163.body: The North proposes splitting different heresies and mortal cults.

choices.A: Accept to increase your quick gains in souls.
choices.B: Refuse and codify your own independent cults.
choices.C: Sign it to better infiltrate human religions discreetly.

hk_164.title: Fight in the Lava Galleries
hk_164.body: A skirmish erupts in galleries where your troops cross paths with those of the North.

choices.A: Reinforce your military presence to impose your law there.
choices.B: Officially mark passage zones.
choices.C: Install secret portals to the world of the living.

hk_165.title: Coalition of Small Kingdoms
hk_165.body: Small infernal kingdoms turn to you out of fear of the North.

choices.A: Absorb them by force into your empire.
choices.B: Create an alliance supervised by a rigorous protocol.
choices.C: Use these kingdoms as pawns on the surface.

hk_166.title: Conference on Modern Torture
hk_166.body: The North proposes a conference on new trends in torture.

choices.A: Send your most inventive torturers.
choices.B: Allow participation only under strict control.
choices.C: Demand that some techniques be tested on Earth.

hk_167.title: Sabotage of the Forges
hk_167.body: Strategic infernal forges suffer sabotage attributed to the North.

choices.A: Strike back with a surprise raid on their arsenals.
choices.B: Launch a major internal security investigation.
choices.C: Exploit the chaos to cover up operations toward the surface.

hk_168.title: Banner Trafficking
hk_168.body: Northern banners bearing a twisted version of your face are spreading through your regions.

choices.A: Let them circulate to stir hatred... and fear.
choices.B: Confiscate and archive every banner according to strict rules.
choices.C: Send a few of those banners to mortal cults.

hk_169.title: Rumor of Frozen Betrayal
hk_169.body: Whispers say some of your generals admire the discipline of the North.

choices.A: Preemptively purge the suspects.
choices.B: Watch their actions through the chain of command.
choices.C: Use them as intermediaries to manipulate the surface.

hk_170.title: Monster of Black Ice
hk_170.body: A monster made of black ice has awakened in a shared corridor.

choices.A: Feed it souls to bend it to your will.
choices.B: Lock it behind a series of seals and records.
choices.C: Send it to haunt the polar zones of the world of the living.

hk_171.title: Project for a Shared Border
hk_171.body: Your administrators propose officially codifying the border with the North.

choices.A: Draw a border so you can focus your legions elsewhere.
choices.B: Refuse: no border limits your kingdom.
choices.C: Create a permeable border toward certain points on the surface.

hk_172.title: Prisoner Exchange
hk_172.body: The North suggests an exchange of especially symbolic prisoners.

choices.A: Accept to recover useful souls.
choices.B: Refuse and establish a strict prisoner protocol.
choices.C: Accept, but release some captives onto the surface.

hk_173.title: Festival of Comparative Tortures
hk_173.body: An official festival compares the tortures of the North to your own.

choices.A: Emphasize raw efficiency in souls.
choices.B: Emphasize rigor and protocol.
choices.C: Export the best ideas to human societies.

hk_174.title: Negotiation Over Heroes
hk_174.body: The North demands a share of certain especially rare hero souls.

choices.A: Give up a few souls in exchange for other concessions.
choices.B: Refuse and sanctify those souls within your internal order.
choices.C: Sometimes let them reincarnate to influence the surface.

hk_175.title: Song of the Northern Mists
hk_175.body: A song from the North makes the walls of your regions tremble.

choices.A: Amplify it to attract more impressionable souls.
choices.B: Filter it through a ritual to make it predictable.
choices.C: Let this song brush the dreams of certain mortals.

hk_176.title: Secret Pact of Non-Interference
hk_176.body: The North offers you a secret pact: each side stops directly sabotaging the other’s affairs.

choices.A: Accept to stabilize your empire in the short term.
choices.B: Refuse and further strengthen your internal order.
choices.C: Sign, but redirect your intrigues toward the surface.

hk_177.title: Contest of Strategists
hk_177.body: Your strategists want to face those of the North in a contest of influence.

choices.A: Judge victory by the number of souls won.
choices.B: Measure victory by the stability restored across the regions.
choices.C: Judge victory by the scale of unrest on the surface.

hk_178.title: Exchange of Manuals of Damnation
hk_178.body: A proposal is made to exchange manuals describing various methods of damnation.

choices.A: Accept to enrich your techniques.
choices.B: Refuse and strengthen your own standards.
choices.C: Adapt some chapters for discreet use among the living.

hk_179.title: Ritual of Merging Braziers
hk_179.body: A ritual could temporarily merge some of the North's braziers with your own.

choices.A: Test the ritual to boost soul harvesting.
choices.B: Ban it until it is perfectly regulated.
choices.C: Direct part of this fusion toward the world of the living.

hk_180.title: Invitation to a Soul Hunt
hk_180.body: The North invites you to a highly visible “soul hunt” across the regions.

choices.A: Join in by unleashing your most ravenous legions.
choices.B: Set strict rules to limit the chaos.
choices.C: Extend this hunt to the dreams and hopes of mortals.

hk_181.title: Joint Tribunal
hk_181.body: A tribunal co-chaired by your kingdom and the North is being considered for certain exceptional cases.

choices.A: Accept to impress souls even more.
choices.B: Refuse and keep a monopoly on judgment.
choices.C: Use this tribunal to condemn human figures.

hk_182.title: Sharing Torture Machines
hk_182.body: The North proposes sharing certain technologies of continuous agony.

choices.A: Adapt them to maximize your soul harvest.
choices.B: Standardize them in your arsenal in an orderly way.
choices.C: Test their effects through strange phenomena on Earth.

hk_183.title: Sabotage of Your Archives
hk_183.body: Your central archives show traces of frost and corruption coming from the North.

choices.A: Answer by burning whole sections of their records.
choices.B: Rebuild your archives with greater rigor.
choices.C: Use the chaos to erase traces on Earth.

hk_184.title: Offer to Merge Pantheons
hk_184.body: The North suggests a partial fusion of your mythologies among mortals.

choices.A: Merge them to increase the appeal of your cults.
choices.B: Refuse and jealously protect your image.
choices.C: Accept, but mainly target human sects.

hk_185.title: Poisoned Gift
hk_185.body: The North sends you an artifact supposedly meant to strengthen your legions, but its effects are unknown.

choices.A: Activate it to strengthen your troops immediately.
choices.B: Place it in a sealed chest, carefully cataloged.
choices.C: Test it on a few human intermediaries.

hk_186.title: Duel Proposed Between Sovereigns
hk_186.body: A sovereign of the North proposes a symbolic duel to settle certain disputes.

choices.A: Accept and turn the duel into a grand spectacle.
choices.B: Refuse, judging it beneath your rank.
choices.C: Accept, but tie the duel to catastrophes on Earth.

hk_187.title: Soul Smuggling Network
hk_187.body: A clandestine network moves souls from one kingdom to another without authorization.

choices.A: Let it thrive in exchange for a fixed cut.
choices.B: Break it and record every culprit.
choices.C: Redirect it to feed projects on the surface.

hk_188.title: Appeal to Higher Arbitration
hk_188.body: The North threatens to appeal to an even older entity to settle your conflicts.

choices.A: Accept the risk, certain of your power.
choices.B: Strengthen your order to present a flawless case.
choices.C: Prepare symbolic sacrifices among the living.

hk_189.title: Bloody Diplomatic Incident
hk_189.body: A Northern delegation was attacked by the damned in one of your regions.

choices.A: Accuse the North of provocation and strike back.
choices.B: Acknowledge faults and codify better security.
choices.C: Use the incident to expand your influence on Earth.

hk_190.title: Council of Crossing Flames
hk_190.body: A special grand council brings your flames and those of the North together in the same hall.

choices.A: Try to completely dominate the assembly.
choices.B: Set strict rules for every intervention.
choices.C: Tie certain decisions to strange phenomena on the surface.

hk_191.title: Treaty of Catastrophes
hk_191.body: The North proposes a treaty to divide influence over the great catastrophes of the world of the living.

choices.A: Seize the opportunity to harvest more souls.
choices.B: Impose limits to preserve the balance of your regions.
choices.C: Concentrate these catastrophes on key human locations.

hk_192.title: Unified Hell Experiment
hk_192.body: A bold experiment would briefly merge some of your regions with those of the North.

choices.A: Accept to create a shock of massive damnation.
choices.B: Refuse, fearing total disorder.
choices.C: Test this unification through human nightmares.

hk_193.title: Revolt of the Messengers
hk_193.body: Your messengers, exhausted by endless trips to and from the North, are demanding a special status.

choices.A: Pay them in extra soul fragments.
choices.B: Create a strictly supervised corps of messengers.
choices.C: Redirect them partly toward missions on the surface.

hk_194.title: Conflicting Accounting
hk_194.body: Your records and those of the North do not match on the exact number of shared souls.

choices.A: You impose your figures, by force if necessary.
choices.B: You organize an extremely rigorous infernal audit.
choices.C: You make certain souls disappear onto the surface.

hk_195.title: Project of a Common Empire
hk_195.body: Some advisers suggest creating a single empire merging your kingdom and the North.

choices.A: Support the idea to increase overall power.
choices.B: Reject it to preserve absolute control over your order.
choices.C: Negotiate in secret to turn this empire toward the surface.

hk_196.title: Revolt of the Archivists
hk_196.body: Your archivists complain about constantly having to adjust your records according to agreements with the North.

choices.A: Push them to work even harder to absorb more souls.
choices.B: Simplify certain agreements to restore clear order.
choices.C: Hand part of the management over to corrupted institutions.

hk_197.title: Chamber of Eternal Compromises
hk_197.body: A special chamber records every compromise you make with other hells.

choices.A: Multiply compromises to maximize soul flows.
choices.B: Limit these agreements to avoid diluting your authority.
choices.C: Use these compromises to trigger events on Earth.

hk_198.title: North's Final Warning
hk_198.body: The North gives you an ultimatum: surrender certain territories or risk open war.

choices.A: Refuse and prepare your legions.
choices.B: Yield secondary zones to buy time.
choices.C: Officially accept, but shift the issue toward the surface.

hk_199.title: Preparing a Grand Treaty
hk_199.body: A great treaty is being prepared to redraw the map of the hells.

choices.A: Aim above all to increase your share of souls.
choices.B: Aim above all to guarantee the stability of your order.
choices.C: Insert hidden clauses affecting the world of the living.

hk_200.title: Signature or Rupture
hk_200.body: Your advisers announce that the treaty with the North is ready to be signed... or rejected.

choices.A: Sign it and proclaim the dawn of a new infernal age.
choices.B: Refuse and accept a long period of organized tension.
choices.C: Sign it while preparing a new corruption on the surface.

hk_201.title: Uncontrolled Climate Crisis
hk_201.body: Mortals are unleashing one climate disaster after another, without truly slowing down.

choices.A: Push their destructive behavior to even greater extremes.
choices.B: Encourage a few measures of order to prolong the chaos.
choices.C: Channel these storms to test new breaches.

hk_202.title: Spiritual Pollution
hk_202.body: The hearts of mortals are saturated with ecological guilt and denial at the same time.

choices.A: Fuel their guilt to harvest more souls.
choices.B: Structure responsible speeches to preserve order.
choices.C: Let these tensions fuel radical movements on the surface.

hk_203.title: Revolt of the Coastal Cities
hk_203.body: Cities threatened by rising waters are begging for miracles.

choices.A: Let the disaster worsen to speed up damnation.
choices.B: Inspire tightly hierarchical emergency plans that are still not enough.
choices.C: Use the panic to pave the way for desperate cults.

hk_204.title: Toxic Waste Leak
hk_204.body: A massive waste leak poisons land and oceans.

choices.A: Whisper to certain mortals to downplay the incident.
choices.B: Encourage the creation of standards, far too late.
choices.C: Turn the anger toward violent political conflicts.

hk_205.title: War of Disinformation
hk_205.body: Lies spread so quickly that mortals no longer know what to believe.

choices.A: Feed every side with false revelations.
choices.B: Promote a few 'reasonable' voices to preserve structure.
choices.C: Bring forth gurus who profit from this fog.

hk_206.title: Social Networks on Fire
hk_206.body: The networks of the human world are turning into arenas of hatred and envy.

choices.A: Amplify toxic comparisons and public humiliation.
choices.B: Support reassuring rules without truly acting.
choices.C: Use these platforms to spread new cults in disguise.

hk_207.title: Influencers of Despair
hk_207.body: Influential figures glorify exhaustion, anger, and nihilism.

choices.A: Boost their reach to harvest more broken souls.
choices.B: Control their message to avoid a total collapse of order.
choices.C: Push them to guide their followers toward destructive choices.

hk_208.title: Overwhelmed Infernal Clinics
hk_208.body: Your clinics are overflowing. Even the most fragile are being left behind.

choices.A: Let leaders downplay the crisis so it gets worse.
choices.B: Inspire a rigid reform that is insufficient but structuring.
choices.C: Turn the anger toward extremist movements.

hk_209.title: Spread of Modern Sects
hk_209.body: New sects promise healing, wealth, and meaning... in exchange for total submission.

choices.A: Encourage their spread to harvest souls on a massive scale.
choices.B: Let institutions create frameworks of control.
choices.C: Favor sects especially connected to your cult.

hk_210.title: No One Believes in Anything Anymore
hk_210.body: Mortals no longer know what is true. You can manipulate them.

choices.A: Blur everything to shatter their bearings.
choices.B: Create one controlled 'official truth.'
choices.C: Offer the illusion of salvation reserved for a chosen few.

hk_211.title: War for Resources
hk_211.body: Several regions are fighting over water, food, and energy.

choices.A: Encourage brutal decisions and looting.
choices.B: Support fragile agreements to prolong the tension.
choices.C: Bring forth charismatic leaders ready to do anything.

hk_212.title: War Machines Without Masters
hk_212.body: Mortals are creating weapons capable of killing without human mercy.

choices.A: Push them to hand over more and more decisions to these machines.
choices.B: Encourage complex regulations that can still be bypassed.
choices.C: Let some of these weapons 'mistake' their targets.

hk_213.title: Total Surveillance
hk_213.body: Surveillance systems watch every gesture, every word.

choices.A: Make surveillance acceptable in the name of safety.
choices.B: Create precise, reassuring, yet deeply intrusive laws.
choices.C: Use this data to manipulate entire crowds.

hk_214.title: Rush Toward AI
hk_214.body: Mortals are handing over their choices and attention to systems they do not understand.

choices.A: Encourage them to abandon their judgment.
choices.B: Structure strict rules that are often ignored.
choices.C: Steer these systems so they always give more power to the same people.

hk_215.title: Crisis of Loneliness
hk_215.body: Never have mortals been so connected... and so isolated.

choices.A: Push them to fill the void with destructive excesses.
choices.B: Encourage a few structures to preserve social order.
choices.C: Bring forth closed, almost sect-like communities.

hk_216.title: Urban Riots
hk_216.body: Entire neighborhoods rise up, burn, and retreat into themselves.

choices.A: Inflame the anger to the point of no return.
choices.B: Inspire law enforcement to follow strict protocols.
choices.C: Bring forth new violent leaders from the chaos.

hk_217.title: Massive Data Leak
hk_217.body: The secrets of millions of mortals are exposed.

choices.A: Use this data to push each person toward their worst temptation.
choices.B: Suggest laws to regulate these leaks without stopping them.
choices.C: Use certain secrets to manipulate human leaders.

hk_218.title: Refuge Denied to the Wandering
hk_218.body: Wandering crowds from devastated areas are met with closed gates.

choices.A: Fuel fear of the other and retreat inward.
choices.B: Support strict policies presented as rational.
choices.C: Create violent groups that feed on these tensions.

hk_219.title: Global Financial Crisis
hk_219.body: Markets collapse, wealth vanishes, fear rises.

choices.A: Push mortals to gamble everything on immediate gain.
choices.B: Inspire complicated and unequal rescue plans.
choices.C: Use this chaos to bind certain powerful people to your pacts.

hk_220.title: Corruption Becomes Normal
hk_220.body: Corruption becomes an open secret in key institutions.

choices.A: Encourage resignation: 'everyone does it.'
choices.B: Stage a few tightly controlled example trials.
choices.C: Offer infernal contracts in secret to the most compromised.

hk_221.title: Distrust of Knowledge
hk_221.body: Mortals are gradually rejecting the most reliable knowledge.

choices.A: Encourage the most absurd yet seductive theories.
choices.B: Support a few institutions to preserve a semblance of order.
choices.C: Create public figures who mix science, conspiracy, and cult.

hk_222.title: Cruelty as Entertainment
hk_222.body: Human suffering becomes a spectacle consumed to entertain, shock, or drive ratings.

choices.A: Push mortals to become completely desensitized.
choices.B: Support strict rules on images that are barely enforced.
choices.C: Use this spectacle to recruit cruel souls.

hk_223.title: Everything for Sale
hk_223.body: Even intimacy, compassion, and grief are becoming products.

choices.A: Encourage the sale of everything sacred.
choices.B: Let a few laws limit the most visible excesses.
choices.C: Create fake charities that serve your interests.

hk_224.title: Cult of Performance
hk_224.body: Mortals define themselves only by their results, numbers, and achievements.

choices.A: Push this cult all the way to self-destruction.
choices.B: Structure 'well-being' rules into productivity.
choices.C: Use that pressure to secure key pacts.

hk_225.title: Collapse of Wild Life
hk_225.body: Earth is losing its species, its forests, and its ancient balances.

choices.A: Encourage the feeling of inevitability and 'too late.'
choices.B: Support tightly controlled protections that are still not enough.
choices.C: Turn this loss into fuel for extreme movements.

hk_226.title: Always More
hk_226.body: People work until they are exhausted.

choices.A: Push bosses to demand even more.
choices.B: Put rules in place... full of exceptions.
choices.C: Create addictions to keep them standing.

hk_227.title: Inner Desertification
hk_227.body: Mortals are losing their taste for nuance, art, and slowness.

choices.A: Push them toward empty, nonstop entertainment.
choices.B: Encourage a few highly codified cultural institutions.
choices.C: Bring forth artistic movements fed by despair.

hk_228.title: Family Crisis
hk_228.body: Family bonds are breaking under tension, silence, and escape.

choices.A: Feed resentment, things left unsaid, and brutal breakups.
choices.B: Promote rigid family models that can become suffocating.
choices.C: Use these fractures to recruit isolated souls.

hk_229.title: Market of Artificial Memories
hk_229.body: Companies promise to recreate or erase memories.

choices.A: Push mortals to flee reality into these illusions.
choices.B: Regulate these practices with weak, complex laws.
choices.C: Insert traces of your influence into these memories.

hk_230.title: Extinction of Collective Hope
hk_230.body: A quiet wave sweeps through the human world: no one believes in a better future anymore.

choices.A: Turn this despair into total apathy and lonely vices.
choices.B: Let a few collective projects emerge, tightly controlled.
choices.C: Offer, through prophets, a 'salvation' that leads to you.

hk_231.title: Drifting Space Colonies
hk_231.body: Orbital stations and distant colonies are gradually slipping beyond all earthly control.

choices.A: Push the colonists to break completely with Earth.
choices.B: Inspire rigid charters to try to preserve some order.
choices.C: Slip cults devoted to you into these isolated communities.

hk_232.title: Race for Space Resources
hk_232.body: Mortals covet asteroids, moons, everything that can be exploited.

choices.A: Inflame their thirst for profit at the expense of all caution.
choices.B: Encourage complex but unstable space treaties.
choices.C: Turn these stakes into almost religious rivalries between nations.

hk_233.title: Metaverse Everywhere
hk_233.body: People spend their lives in virtual worlds. You can use that to trap them.

choices.A: Lock them inside and drain their will.
choices.B: Set limits to preserve a false calm.
choices.C: Create hidden zones devoted to your cult.

hk_234.title: Eternal Avatar
hk_234.body: A technology proposes to immortalize the consciousness of mortals in digital avatars.

choices.A: Encourage this escape from real death.
choices.B: Regulate this pseudo-immortality with strict rules.
choices.C: Slip in flaws that allow your influence through.

hk_235.title: Chaotic Transhumanism
hk_235.body: Implants, genetic modifications, body optimization: some mortals are redefining themselves.

choices.A: Push the most extreme modifications.
choices.B: Create legal standards that are contradictory and complex.
choices.C: Reserve certain 'enhancements' for servants bound to you.

hk_236.title: Unofficial Cloning
hk_236.body: Secret laboratories are playing with human cloning without any framework.

choices.A: Let these experiments spread in secret.
choices.B: Leak certain information to justify spectacular laws.
choices.C: Mark certain clones with a seal known to your servants.

hk_237.title: Trafficking in Cursed Remedies
hk_237.body: A trade in rare remedies and cursed products thrives in the shadows.

choices.A: Encourage cynicism: everything has a price, even the body.
choices.B: Support police operations that are highly visible but shallow.
choices.C: Use certain channels to bind surgeons to your pacts.

hk_238.title: Bioengineering Revolution
hk_238.body: Modified plants, animals, and bacteria are beginning to reshape entire ecosystems.

choices.A: Push mortals to test without waiting for the consequences.
choices.B: Impose trial protocols that are quickly bypassed.
choices.C: Create special strains that favor your future cults.

hk_239.title: Disaster Tourism
hk_239.body: Mortals pay to visit disaster zones, battlefields, and places of tragedy.

choices.A: Normalize this tourism until it becomes mass entertainment.
choices.B: Regulate these practices with strict but symbolic rules.
choices.C: Draw these visitors toward experiences that destroy empathy.

hk_240.title: Commercial Memory of the Dead
hk_240.body: Companies manage the profiles and messages of the dead as a resource to be sold.

choices.A: Monetize the presence of the dead in the lives of the living as much as possible.
choices.B: Set a few legal limits on how that data is used.
choices.C: Slip messages leading to you into those archives.

hk_241.title: Politics of the Scapegoat
hk_241.body: Leaders systematically label certain groups as responsible for everything.

choices.A: Amplify this strategy until it becomes open persecution.
choices.B: Encourage commissions to preserve a form of order.
choices.C: Turn these tensions into almost religious conflicts.

hk_242.title: Theatrical Justice
hk_242.body: Trials are becoming media shows more than places of truth.

choices.A: Encourage swift and spectacular judgments.
choices.B: Impose very strict rules that are often twisted.
choices.C: Use these spectacles to crush your enemies.

hk_243.title: Education in Ruins
hk_243.body: Education systems are collapsing under inequality, tension, and exhaustion.

choices.A: Push each generation to come out more disillusioned than the last.
choices.B: Structure complex reforms that change every five years.
choices.C: Create parallel schools devoted to your ideology.

hk_244.title: Chemical Fog
hk_244.body: A chemical haze from factories and accidents poisons the air, bodies, and minds.

choices.A: Make this use so ordinary that no real thought remains.
choices.B: Regulate certain products while letting the others thrive.
choices.C: Tie certain distribution networks to your servants.

hk_245.title: Colonization of Dreams
hk_245.body: Advertising, screens, and exhaustion invade even the sleep of mortals.

choices.A: Blur the line between dreams and social pressure.
choices.B: Let speeches about 'sacred rest' emerge, barely followed.
choices.C: Use these dreams to implant symbols that lead to you.

hk_246.title: Market Spiritualities
hk_246.body: A multitude of small spiritualities sell inner peace, success, and serenity in kits.

choices.A: Encourage permanent spiritual hopping.
choices.B: Frame these practices within respectable institutions.
choices.C: Hide certain rituals inside 'personal development.'

hk_247.title: Sacralization of Fame
hk_247.body: Being known becomes more important than who someone really is.

choices.A: Push mortals to sacrifice everything for a little glory.
choices.B: Create moral codes around 'good' fame.
choices.C: Use that hunger to offer quick and dangerous pacts.

hk_248.title: Flight to Tax Havens
hk_248.body: Wealth slips into zones beyond the reach of most laws.

choices.A: Encourage the extreme concentration of fortunes.
choices.B: Support opaque and incomplete international agreements.
choices.C: Forge pacts with a few great holders of wealth.

hk_249.title: Ordinary Mental Cruelty
hk_249.body: Mental cruelty is becoming commonplace in daily life.

choices.A: Turn this silent violence into a cultural norm.
choices.B: Impose charters that only create the illusion of protection.
choices.C: Turn some victims into executioners, then into servants.

hk_250.title: Fear of Growing Old
hk_250.body: Mortals want to live longer, no matter the cost.

choices.A: Feed their obsession until it becomes madness.
choices.B: Sell a 'solution' reserved for the rich.
choices.C: Offer extra years... in exchange for their soul.

hk_251.title: Rain of Feathers
hk_251.body: A rain of golden feathers falls across your regions. The damned realize Heaven is showing itself.

choices.A: Profane those feathers by burning them beneath the screams of souls.
choices.B: Log them as evidence in your archives.
choices.C: Let them rise back to the surface as ambiguous 'miracles.'

hk_252.title: Messenger with Wings Too White
hk_252.body: A messenger angel descends with a scroll: Heaven demands a new border agreement.

choices.A: Tear the scroll in front of him and assert your sovereignty.
choices.B: Accept an extremely rigid protocol of discussion.
choices.C: Leak the existence of this angel to a few mortals.

hk_253.title: Contested Souls
hk_253.body: Some dead are claimed both by Heaven and by you.

choices.A: Declare that any ambiguity is settled in your favor.
choices.B: Create an arbitration tribunal with infernally complex rules.
choices.C: Let some cases get lost in visions on Earth.

hk_254.title: Parasitic Heavenly Songs
hk_254.body: Songs from Heaven can be heard even at the bottom of your pits.

choices.A: Drown those songs in a din of lamentations.
choices.B: Analyze and carefully classify them in your records.
choices.C: Let those melodies enter dreams, but distorted.

hk_255.title: Petition of the Saints
hk_255.body: A group of saints officially asks for more compassion toward certain damned souls.

choices.A: Laugh openly at their naivety.
choices.B: Open a 'review' file that will last as long as eternity.
choices.C: Let the idea of amnesty infect a few mortal hearts.

hk_256.title: Non-Interference Pact
hk_256.body: Heaven proposes a pact: fewer direct temptations in exchange for fewer spectacular miracles.

choices.A: Refuse and continue the war of total influence.
choices.B: Accept by precisely codifying every exception.
choices.C: Sign officially while shifting the game onto the surface.

hk_257.title: Overwhelmed Angels
hk_257.body: Guardian angels complain above: too many souls are slipping toward you.

choices.A: Multiply opportunities for downfall to test their limits.
choices.B: Accept a few 'corridors of grace' to preserve overall order.
choices.C: Let frustrated angels influence mortals more darkly.

hk_258.title: Cracked Bridge of Light
hk_258.body: An ancient bridge of light between Heaven and Hell cracks, exposing unexpected passages.

choices.A: Sabotage the bridge to cut every direct link.
