choices.B: Place the bridge under strict administrative control.
choices.C: Let a few cracks open at random onto the surface.

hk_259.title: Runaway Soul
hk_259.body: A soul promised to Heaven has managed to slip into your regions through cunning.

choices.A: Keep it as a trophy despite the diplomatic risk.
choices.B: Send it back with a detailed report proving your good faith.
choices.C: Send it back only after showing it Hell... and the surface.

hk_260.title: Canceled Miracle
hk_260.body: A miracle in preparation on Earth is suddenly canceled by your maneuvers.

choices.A: Boast to the angels that you shattered their little show.
choices.B: Record this heavenly failure in your archives for later.
choices.C: Let the rumor of a failed miracle poison faith.

hk_261.title: Contest of Messiahs
hk_261.body: Several figures present themselves as saviors sent from above... some do not come from Heaven.

choices.A: Multiply false prophets to dilute all true light.
choices.B: Control their movements through infernal rules.
choices.C: Leave a few sincere chosen ones under heavy pressure from darkness.

hk_262.title: Wrath of an Archangel
hk_262.body: An archangel threatens to unleash his wrath on some of your regions.

choices.A: Provoke even more and test his limits.
choices.B: Yield a minor symbol to preserve balance.
choices.C: Turn his anger toward dramatic events on Earth.

hk_263.title: Negotiations Over Purgatory
hk_263.body: Heaven wants to strengthen an intermediate zone to ease your prisons.

choices.A: Refuse: you return no soul on the way.
choices.B: Accept, but impose strict sorting rules.
choices.C: Use this purgatory to influence the living through visions.

hk_264.title: Desertion of an Angel
hk_264.body: Whispers say an angel has deserted Heaven, disgusted by certain decisions.

choices.A: Welcome him and make him a symbol of your superiority.
choices.B: Question him methodically and record every detail.
choices.C: Secretly send this fallen angel to spread trouble on the surface.

hk_265.title: Blocked Prayers
hk_265.body: Prayers are disappearing. Mortals panic and seek answers.

choices.A: Let the doubt grow.
choices.B: Pretend that 'everything is under control.'
choices.C: Answer in your own way while passing yourself off as Heaven.

hk_266.title: Accusation of Interference
hk_266.body: Heaven accuses you of meddling in miracles to corrupt them.

choices.A: Own it fully and dare the angels to intervene.
choices.B: Deny everything and demand a heavenly-infernal audit.
choices.C: Keep going, but only through earthly 'coincidences.'

hk_267.title: Leak of Light
hk_267.body: A light from above seeps into part of your tunnels.

choices.A: Devour it with your darkness before it spreads.
choices.B: Lock it in a sealed chamber, carefully cataloged.
choices.C: Let a few reflections echo toward the horizon of mortals.

hk_268.title: Dissonant Choir
hk_268.body: The songs of your damned overlap with an angelic choir. The result is... strange.

choices.A: Turn this sonic chaos into a weapon of terror.
choices.B: Try to codify these dissonances into your rituals.
choices.C: Let this echo reach the ears of certain mortal artists.

hk_269.title: Stubborn Patron Saint
hk_269.body: A saint refuses to let a city fall completely under your influence.

choices.A: Multiply targeted temptations to break his resistance.
choices.B: Bypass this saint by attacking other places.
choices.C: Create scandals around his memory among the living.

hk_270.title: True Relic
hk_270.body: An authentic relic linked to Heaven reappears on Earth.

choices.A: Surround it with false miracles to blur its meaning.
choices.B: Quietly register it in your records as an object to watch.
choices.C: Push some people to kill each other for control of it.

hk_271.title: Heavenly Procession
hk_271.body: A procession from Paradise briefly crosses the sky above your kingdom.

choices.A: Try to capture a few souls as they pass.
choices.B: Let them pass to avoid a major incident.
choices.C: Project this vision into the dreams of unstable mortals.

hk_272.title: Revision of the Rules of Damnation
hk_272.body: Heaven proposes revising the list of mortal sins.

choices.A: Reject any reform that would limit your harvest.
choices.B: Accept, as long as you write the fine print yourself.
choices.C: Rewrite certain sins to better trap modern mortals.

hk_273.title: Unleashed Cult of Angels
hk_273.body: On Earth, some mortals idealize angels to the point of making them idols.

choices.A: Encourage idolatry to divert true spirituality.
choices.B: Let Heaven handle this embarrassing drift.
choices.C: Slip your own symbols into these cults.

hk_274.title: Negotiation Over Martyrs
hk_274.body: Heaven wants to recover the souls of martyrs you consider corrupted.

choices.A: Refuse: a fanatical martyr feeds you perfectly.
choices.B: Accept case by case after detailed investigation.
choices.C: Sometimes let them rise back, marked by your scars.

hk_275.title: Rain of Local Miracles
hk_275.body: A region experiences a series of small miracles attributed to Heaven.

choices.A: Counterattack with an avalanche of targeted temptations.
choices.B: Watch and archive every event without intervening directly.
choices.C: Turn these miracles into a source of jealousy and social chaos.

hk_276.title: Broken Harp
hk_276.body: A heavenly harp falls to pieces in one of your lakes of fire.

choices.A: Turn it into an instrument of sonic torture.
choices.B: Preserve it intact as proof of Heaven's failure.
choices.C: Let fragments of it rise back into the world of artists.

hk_277.title: Rumor of Reconciliation
hk_277.body: A rumor spreads: one day, Heaven and Hell will be reconciled.

choices.A: Mock that idea until it disappears.
choices.B: File it in your archives as a distant hypothesis.
choices.C: Let this rumor feed strange sects on Earth.

hk_278.title: Souls in Transit
hk_278.body: A rare corridor allows souls to glimpse Heaven and Hell before choosing.

choices.A: Disrupt the corridor so it opens more often to you.
choices.B: Set strict rules for using that passage.
choices.C: Project this choice into the dreams of certain living people.

hk_279.title: Dispute Over Prayers
hk_279.body: Heaven claims that many mortal prayers should return to it.

choices.A: Contest it: some young mortals can already return to you.
choices.B: Officially concede while influencing adults instead.
choices.C: Turn certain prayers into nightmares that will mark their lives.

hk_280.title: Heavenly Library
hk_280.body: A library above is discovered that also records your own deeds.

choices.A: Try to sabotage those archives through indirect influence.
choices.B: Compare their data with your own records to adjust order.
choices.C: Let mortals see this library in dreams.

hk_281.title: Souls That Refuse Both
hk_281.body: A few souls reject both Heaven and Hell, claiming their own path.

choices.A: Break them until they finally choose.
choices.B: Create a special status for 'unclassified' souls in your order.
choices.C: Let this idea of total refusal inspire certain mortals.

hk_282.title: Angels Infiltrated on Earth
hk_282.body: Angels descend discreetly to Earth to interfere with your plans.

choices.A: Track them through your servants and corrupt them.
choices.B: Watch them methodically to adjust your strategies.
choices.C: Let humans mistake them for your own envoys.

hk_283.title: Sign in the Sky
hk_283.body: An apparition visible to entire crowds is interpreted as a sign from Heaven.

choices.A: Immediately spark a scandal or tragedy that diverts its meaning.
choices.B: Let religious institutions tear each other apart over its meaning.
choices.C: Inspire contradictory interpretations that lead to division.

hk_284.title: Angel Update
hk_284.body: Heaven 'updates' certain angels to better understand the modern world.

choices.A: Exploit their remaining flaws to trap them.
choices.B: Observe these new methods in detail to adapt your order.
choices.C: Push them to give mortals advice that ends badly.

hk_285.title: Compassion Contest
hk_285.body: A heavenly initiative encourages mortals to practice radical compassion.

choices.A: Turn it into a short-lived fad that is quickly mocked.
choices.B: Let a few communities hold strong to maintain balance.
choices.C: Divert that compassion toward destructive causes.

hk_286.title: Riot in Heaven
hk_286.body: Whispers say a quarrel is breaking out even among the blessed.

choices.A: Spread the rumor everywhere to weaken Heaven's image.
choices.B: Carefully record every detail for future negotiations.
choices.C: Let certain mortals receive visions of that disorder.

hk_287.title: Recovered Souls
hk_287.body: Paradise manages to pull back certain souls at the last moment, just before their final fall into your realm.

choices.A: Refuse any reduction of sentence.
choices.B: Accept a tiny quota in exchange for official concessions.
choices.C: Let some rise back up to tell horrors to the living.

hk_288.title: Imposed Reconciliation
hk_288.body: A higher power demands that Heaven and Hell find common ground on certain matters.

choices.A: Resist all constraint, even if it sparks a crisis.
choices.B: Accept an extremely bureaucratic framework of conciliation.
choices.C: Transpose this conflict into human institutions.

hk_289.title: Conflict Over Animals
hk_289.body: The question arises: do animals belong in Heaven, in Hell, or elsewhere?

choices.A: Claim all fierce and cruel beasts for yourself.
choices.B: Propose a very orderly neutral archival zone.
choices.C: Let the living build religions around animals.

hk_290.title: Lake of Light in the Middle of Fire
hk_290.body: A lake of pure light suddenly appears at the heart of one of your volcanoes.

choices.A: Try to extinguish it by brute force.
choices.B: Mark it off, inventory it, and integrate it into your order.
choices.C: Make its reflections appear in sacred places.

hk_291.title: Dispute Over Artists
hk_291.body: Heaven claims that certain inspired artists should never end up with you.

choices.A: Answer that genius excuses nothing.
choices.B: Set up a special commission for their cases.
choices.C: Inspire on Earth a cult of cursed artists.

hk_292.title: Broken Seal on Earth
hk_292.body: An ancient seal meant to protect a sacred place is broken. Heaven and Hell blame each other.

choices.A: Exploit the breach immediately.
choices.B: Propose a joint investigation to assign responsibility.
choices.C: Turn this place into a focal point for ambiguous apparitions.

hk_293.title: Contradictory Prophecy
hk_293.body: An earthly prophecy announces both Heaven's victory... and yours.

choices.A: Push mortals toward the most destructive interpretation.
choices.B: Classify the prophecy among the cases to watch.
choices.C: Create rival sects around the 'true' meaning.

hk_294.title: Exchange of Official Rituals
hk_294.body: An exchange of studies on official rituals is proposed: prayers from above, rites from below.

choices.A: Refuse to let your secrets rise upward.
choices.B: Accept, but censor anything that would implicate you too much.
choices.C: Turn certain rituals into popular practices.

hk_295.title: Aborted Common Festival
hk_295.body: A mad idea is circulating: organize a symbolic celebration between Heaven and Hell.

choices.A: Sabotage the project from the beginning.
choices.B: Demand such a strict protocol that nothing will be spontaneous.
choices.C: Let the idea spread to Earth and feed an ambiguous celebration.

hk_296.title: Exemplary Soul
hk_296.body: A soul, even after seeing your horrors, keeps loving Heaven.

choices.A: Torture it until that attachment breaks.
choices.B: Study it as a textbook case in your administration.
choices.C: Let its story reach mortals, exaggerated.

hk_297.title: King of Hell Canonized
hk_297.body: On Earth, a cult begins to present you as a necessary figure of balance.

choices.A: Encourage this cult: being worshiped is always useful.
choices.B: Watch it so it does not disrupt your internal order too much.
choices.C: Have it condemned to make it even more popular.

hk_298.title: Angel on a Punitive Mission
hk_298.body: An angel is sent to punish certain of your 'excesses' on Earth.

choices.A: Challenge him openly with infernal wonders.
choices.B: Let him strike secondary targets to calm Heaven.
choices.C: Push him to go too far, turning mortals against him.

hk_299.title: Vision of an Empty Hell
hk_299.body: Some mortals claim to have seen a vision: a Hell without souls.

choices.A: Turn that vision into a joke, just an illusion.
choices.B: Record it as an unlikely variable in your calculations.
choices.C: Let that vision feed the idea that no one will be damned.

hk_300.title: Final Deal
hk_300.body: You are offered an agreement to calm the war. But it comes at a price.

choices.A: Burn everything. No deal.
choices.B: Sign and strengthen your rules.
choices.C: Sign... then strike mortals at the heart.

hk_301.title: Revolt of the Scribes
hk_301.body: Your scribes are revolting: too many files, too many souls, and no one can keep up anymore.

choices.A: Demand that they write until their quills break.
choices.B: Reorganize the administration by creating new offices.
choices.C: Automate part of the sorting by delegating it to the surface.

hk_302.title: Demonic Gladiators
hk_302.body: Demons want to create a permanent arena for prestige combat.

choices.A: Let them tear each other apart to entertain the damned.
choices.B: Structure strict rules and elite ranks.
choices.C: Broadcast the spectacle into the dreams of mortals.

hk_303.title: Rumor of Betrayal
hk_303.body: One of your lieutenants is said to be building his own faction.

choices.A: Trap him publicly to assert your dominance.
choices.B: Place him under close surveillance in a cell of order.
choices.C: Use them as a pawn to infiltrate other regions.

hk_304.title: New Torments
hk_304.body: Your executioners want to 'improve' the punishments.

choices.A: Approve it: more pain, more shattered souls.
choices.B: Frame it with strict rules.
choices.C: Test it on mortals first, in secret.

hk_305.title: Union of the Damned
hk_305.body: A group of damned souls is demanding 'basic rights' in your pits.

choices.A: Crush this movement to remind them what Hell is.
choices.B: Create a very strict pseudo-charter, purely decorative.
choices.C: Let this union inspire a few human revolts.

hk_306.title: Festival of Flames
hk_306.body: Your legions want to organize a festival to celebrate your victories.

choices.A: Allow a total outburst of festive violence.
choices.B: Frame the celebration within a rigorous military protocol.
choices.C: Project visions of the festival into the minds of mortal artists.

hk_307.title: School of Corruption
hk_307.body: A proposal is made to open a great school to train the best corrupters.

choices.A: Accept and recruit the cruelest talents.
choices.B: Integrate this school into the existing administrative order.
choices.C: Send its best graduates to teach on Earth.

hk_308.title: Storm of Souls
hk_308.body: A strange storm spins souls around and mixes up the records.

choices.A: Dive into the chaos to increase your harvest.
choices.B: Suspend all judgment and sort everything by hand.
choices.C: Let the storm blow all the way into the world of the living.

hk_309.title: The Chronicler
hk_309.body: A chronicler wants to write the story of your reign.

choices.A: Give him everything: let him drown in information.
choices.B: Control everything: not a word without you.
choices.C: Let passages leak onto Earth.

hk_310.title: Rationing the Flames
hk_310.body: The eternal flames seem to be weakening in certain districts.

choices.A: Reassign the flames to the most productive zones.
choices.B: Set up a strict quota system.
choices.C: Rely on the surface to provide new fuel.

hk_311.title: Black Market of Pain
hk_311.body: A secret trade in exchanged suffering has developed among the damned.

choices.A: Let it happen: anything that increases overall pain suits you.
choices.B: Regulate this market to avoid imbalances.
choices.C: Export this system into the dreams of the living.

hk_312.title: Architects of the Abyss
hk_312.body: Demonic architects want to reshape certain regions.

choices.A: Give them free rein to create new horrors.
choices.B: Approve detailed plans that respect a strict order.
choices.C: Copy human structures to reassure newly arrived souls.

hk_313.title: Library of Regrets
hk_313.body: A proposal is made to gather all mortal regrets in one single place.

choices.A: Turn it into a well of torment that can be consulted at will.
choices.B: Index every regret to refine your future temptations.
choices.C: Let certain mortals feel the echo of this library.

hk_314.title: Tournament of Tempters
hk_314.body: The best tempters compete to prove their superiority.

choices.A: Reward the cruelest and most inventive.
choices.B: Formalize a ranking and an order of promotion.
choices.C: Give some winners special missions on Earth.

hk_315.title: Epidemic of Weariness
hk_315.body: Even some demons seem tired of torturing in the same way all the time.

choices.A: Push them to rediscover pure cruelty.
choices.B: Set up a highly organized rotation of duties.
choices.C: Let that emptiness spread to the living.

hk_316.title: Escape into Dreams
hk_316.body: Some of the damned are taking refuge in lucid dreams to flee pain.

choices.A: Shatter those refuges with even worse nightmares.
choices.B: Catalog those escape routes to control them.
choices.C: Test these mechanisms of escape on certain mortals.

hk_317.title: Experiments on Time
hk_317.body: Demon scientists want to bend time to repeat the same pain forever.

choices.A: Let them experiment on anonymous souls.
choices.B: Frame these experiments to preserve an overall structure.
choices.C: Apply those temporal distortions to key human lives.

hk_318.title: Court of Forbidden Pleasures
hk_318.body: An infernal court is forming around perverse pleasures reserved for a privileged few.

choices.A: Look away as long as it attracts more souls.
choices.B: Integrate this court into the official order, with ranks and titles.
choices.C: Project that logic of privilege into human elites.

hk_319.title: Competition of Blasphemies
hk_319.body: A contest is organized to invent the most refined blasphemies.

choices.A: Let dark creativity run wild.
choices.B: Keep the most effective ones in an official manual.
choices.C: Send some blasphemies up into popular culture.

hk_320.title: Deserted Region
hk_320.body: A once-busy region is now strangely less populated.

choices.A: Transfer new souls there to revive activity.
choices.B: Completely redesign this region around a new concept.
choices.C: Use this empty region as a testing zone before acting among the living.

hk_321.title: Loyalty of a Forgotten Kingdom
hk_321.body: An ancient human kingdom, nearly erased from history, renews its loyalty to your name.

choices.A: Honor it by reviving its symbols in your armies.
choices.B: Archive it carefully for strategic use.
choices.C: Let a few remnants reappear on Earth.

hk_322.title: Silent Forges
hk_322.body: The demonic forges are slowing down for lack of new metals and ideas.

choices.A: Force production by recycling everything in sight.
choices.B: Plan a full overhaul of the workshops.
choices.C: Inspire human inventors to create these machines.

hk_323.title: Inverted Carnival
hk_323.body: Your demons want to organize a carnival where executioners and victims swap roles.

choices.A: Launch this carnival to shatter every frame of reference.
choices.B: Set limits to avoid a total collapse of order.
choices.C: Make this concept echo through human celebrations.

hk_324.title: Unknown Ritual
hk_324.body: A forgotten ritual spontaneously reactivates in a remote corner of Hell.

choices.A: Let it unfold and observe.
choices.B: Integrate it into your system after analyzing it.
choices.C: Send this ritual back up into human grimoires.

hk_325.title: Contest of Lies
hk_325.body: Your agents organize a contest: who can tell the most destructive lie?

choices.A: Reward the lies that destroy entire lives.
choices.B: Carefully record every technique for your archives.
choices.C: Plant those lies in public human speeches.

hk_326.title: Opinions of the Old Demons
hk_326.body: The oldest demons demand a special council to give you their opinion.

choices.A: Ignore them and let them stew.
choices.B: Listen to them and integrate some of their ideas into your order.
choices.C: Send them to 'advise' human leaders.

hk_327.title: Workshop of Altered Memories
hk_327.body: A workshop offers to rewrite the memories of the damned to deepen their torments.

choices.A: Approve the workshop and allow total falsification.
choices.B: Create protocols to classify every manipulated memory.
choices.C: Sow false memories in certain living people.

hk_328.title: Trial of the Mirror
hk_328.body: A mirror of black stone shows souls what they could have been.

choices.A: Force every soul to look until madness.
choices.B: Reserve the mirror for selected cases in a precise ritual.
choices.C: Let its image appear in certain human dreams.

hk_329.title: Hunt for Fugitives
hk_329.body: A few souls are trying to hide in forgotten areas of Hell.

choices.A: Launch a merciless hunt.
choices.B: Establish a special police force for escapes.
choices.C: Observe and draw inspiration from their strategies to trap the living.

hk_330.title: Cult of Ashes
hk_330.body: A small cult of the damned worships your ashes as relics.

choices.A: Encourage them: worship is always useful.
choices.B: Integrate this cult into the official ritual.
choices.C: Let this idea attract humans drawn to destruction.

hk_331.title: Agreement with Nightmares
hk_331.body: The entities that inhabit nightmares are demanding more independence.

choices.A: Force them under your authority.
choices.B: Negotiate a treaty in which their actions remain accounted for.
choices.C: Let them experiment freely in human nights.

hk_332.title: Lessons in Black Irony
hk_332.body: A demon proposes teaching the damned black irony so they destroy one another.

choices.A: Allow these lessons to multiply invisible wounds.
choices.B: Institutionalize them as a mandatory discipline.
choices.C: Send these techniques to the living disguised as 'humor.'

hk_333.title: Megalomania of a General
hk_333.body: One general of your legions already sees himself as king in your place.

choices.A: Break him as an example to all.
choices.B: Promote him into a controlled but prestigious role.
choices.C: Let him lead operations on Earth, far from your throne.

hk_334.title: Collection Fever
hk_334.body: Some demons collect insignificant objects from mortals.

choices.A: Mock this obsession and punish it.
choices.B: Organize these collections in an orderly infernal museum.
choices.C: Make humans feel a lack without visible cause.

hk_335.title: Footsteps at the Bottom of the Abyss
hk_335.body: Footsteps can be heard in an abyss that is supposed to be empty.

choices.A: Send armed scouts to explore.
choices.B: Install a permanent guard and surveillance protocols.
choices.C: Let this mystery influence certain human stories.

hk_336.title: Market of Broken Promises
hk_336.body: A clandestine market trades broken promises among the damned.

choices.A: Turn it into an official center of moral torture.
choices.B: Set up a precise record for every promise.
choices.C: Spread this concept through human politics.

hk_337.title: Contest of Demonic Grimaces
hk_337.body: Your demons organize a contest for the most terrifying faces.

choices.A: Encourage creativity to strengthen fear.
choices.B: Standardize the best masks for your legions.
choices.C: Project these faces into the nightmares of mortals.

hk_338.title: Lake of Silence
hk_338.body: A lake where no scream can be heard appears in your domains.

choices.A: Throw the souls that scream too much into it.
choices.B: Study it to see how you can use it in your realm.
choices.C: Connect this lake to places of extreme solitude on Earth.

hk_339.title: Invasion of Tiny Creatures
hk_339.body: Tiny infernal creatures are invading the cells of the damned.

choices.A: Let them gnaw through everything, nerves included.
choices.B: Train them and classify them into specialized units.
choices.C: Send them to infest a few human homes.

hk_340.title: School of Dark Diplomacy
hk_340.body: A school devoted to negotiation, blackmail, and double talk is proposed to you.

choices.A: Launch the school and recruit the most vicious.
choices.B: Integrate it into your administration for precise missions.
choices.C: Let its graduates weave toxic agreements among mortals.

hk_341.title: Clocks of Eternity
hk_341.body: Giant clocks appear, marking not time, but accumulated suffering.

choices.A: Install them everywhere to crush souls.
choices.B: Keep them for key places to preserve terror.
choices.C: Make their ticking echo in the minds of certain living people.

hk_342.title: Sarcasm Contest
hk_342.body: An entire hall resounds with sarcasm that slices through souls.

choices.A: Encourage this cruel sport.
choices.B: Standardize the best lines into official manuals.
choices.C: Turn this style into fashionable humor among humans.

hk_343.title: Overturned Graves
hk_343.body: Certain graves on Earth are mysteriously overturned.

choices.A: See it as a sign of your power and amplify it.
choices.B: Record each case and correlate it with your records.
choices.C: Use these overturnings to spark local legends.

hk_344.title: Duel of Seers
hk_344.body: Two infernal seers argue over the best way to predict human downfall.

choices.A: Push them into fierce competition.
choices.B: Create an official bureau of predictions.
choices.C: Let certain prophecies reach mortals.

hk_345.title: Bridge of Chains
hk_345.body: A bridge of chains links two regions of Hell that had stopped speaking to one another.

choices.A: Use it to intensify the exchange of souls.
choices.B: Strictly regulate that passage.
choices.C: Symbolically tie this bridge to human alliances.

hk_346.title: Escape of Embers
hk_346.body: Embers escape from your volcanoes and appear in certain earthly homes.

choices.A: Let these embers fuel domestic violence.
choices.B: Map every point of appearance.
choices.C: Turn these embers into recurring symbols of your pacts.

hk_347.title: Lack of New Sins
hk_347.body: Your advisers complain: they feel they have already tried everything.

choices.A: Force them to innovate under threat of punishment.
choices.B: Organize structured workshops in 'evil creativity.'
choices.C: Draw inspiration from the strangest recent human behaviors.

hk_348.title: Laughing Doors
hk_348.body: Some doors of Hell burst into laughter every time a soul passes through.

choices.A: Encourage this permanent mockery.
choices.B: Set the doors to laugh at precise moments.
choices.C: Let that laughter be heard in very serious places on Earth.

hk_349.title: Mock Forgiveness
hk_349.body: A demon proposes acting out forgiveness in order to torture better afterward.

choices.A: Allow this cruel performance.
choices.B: Integrate it into an official procedure of 'grace.'
choices.C: Test this mock forgiveness in close human relationships.

hk_350.title: Cracked Crown
hk_350.body: Your own crown shows a light crack, visible only up close.

choices.A: Ignore the crack and act as if nothing is wrong.
choices.B: Study it with your experts to strengthen your order.
choices.C: Let certain beings understand that even you are changing.

hk_351.title: March of the Iron Helmets
hk_351.body: Your heavy legions demand the right to parade before your throne every day.

choices.A: Allow a permanent parade that crushes the damned.
choices.B: Establish a strict protocol with schedules and routes.
choices.C: Use these parades as visions of terror for certain mortals.

hk_352.title: Statues of Fallen Rulers
hk_352.body: An entire gallery gathers the statues of human kings who fell under your power.

choices.A: Display them to further humiliate their souls.
choices.B: Classify each statue by type of downfall in your records.
choices.C: Let these statues appear in the dreams of rulers.

hk_353.title: Wall of Broken Oaths
hk_353.body: Every broken oath is carved into black stone.

choices.A: Glue all oath-breakers to it by force.
choices.B: Organize the oaths by category in a strict hierarchy.
choices.C: Project this wall into the nightmares of future liars.

hk_354.title: Contest of Infernal Slogans
hk_354.body: Your advisers propose creating slogans to sell despair more effectively.

choices.A: Approve the most shocking ones and repeat them everywhere.
choices.B: Archive and test each formula methodically.
choices.C: Scatter those slogans through human advertising.

hk_355.title: Bells of Embers
hk_355.body: Great ember bells ring with each new damnation.

choices.A: Make them ring until the souls go mad.
choices.B: Set a precise clock for each tolling.
choices.C: Echo those bells in certain human sacred places.

hk_356.title: Unreadable Manuscripts
hk_356.body: Manuscripts appear, covered in writing that even your demons struggle to read.

choices.A: Give them to the damned to drive them mad trying.
choices.B: Create a specialized section to slowly decipher them.
choices.C: Let fragments of these texts enter literature.

hk_357.title: Tower of Whispers
hk_357.body: A new tower endlessly repeats the most shameful confessions of souls.

choices.A: Imprison the greatest hypocrites there.
choices.B: Classify the whispers by theme to optimize tortures.
choices.C: Let certain whispers reach the ears of influential living people.

hk_358.title: Ball of Cracked Masks
hk_358.body: Your demons organize a ball where each mask is split, revealing the wearer's true ugliness.

choices.A: Encourage this permanent masquerade.
choices.B: Use these masks to identify and sort your servants.
choices.C: Inspire this ball in worldly human celebrations.

hk_359.title: Laboratory of Illusions
hk_359.body: A laboratory experiments with illusions capable of replacing reality for the damned.

choices.A: Plunge souls into a false perfect life before the fall.
choices.B: Catalog each illusion as a tool of order.
choices.C: Test these illusions in the dreams of key people on Earth.

hk_360.title: Game of Ember Chairs
hk_360.body: Your jailers invent a cruel game in which the damned fight over burning seats.

choices.A: Encourage this competition without rules.
choices.B: Set up a precise rulebook and make it a ritual.
choices.C: Import this concept into human office life.

hk_361.title: Cartographers of the Abyss
hk_361.body: Demonic cartographers want to draw the complete map of your abysses.

choices.A: Let them get lost, as long as souls suffer.
choices.B: Control every map to structure Hell even more.
choices.C: Let fragments of those maps reach humans.

hk_362.title: Tournament of Cruel Trials
hk_362.body: A contest rewards the most original cruel methods.

choices.A: Give total power over whole districts to the winners.
choices.B: Standardize the cruel methods in your official manual.
choices.C: Inspire harsher behavior among humans.

hk_363.title: River of Oblivion
hk_363.body: A river erases the names of souls. Some beg to be spared.

choices.A: Throw in those who refuse oblivion.
choices.B: Keep a trace of every name.
choices.C: Let that fear flow into the dreams of the living.

hk_364.title: Mocking Judges
hk_364.body: A college of demonic judges begins laughing at every defense offered by souls.

choices.A: Encourage them to ridicule every attempt at defense.
choices.B: Time their mockery to preserve a semblance of procedure.
choices.C: Instill this style in certain human courts.

hk_365.title: Cemetery of Thrones
hk_365.body: Broken thrones of former powerful rulers are piled up in your realm.

choices.A: Organize forced visits there for newly damned rulers.
choices.B: Classify each throne by type of regime for your internal order.
choices.C: Show visions of this cemetery to current rulers.

hk_366.title: Souls of Resentment
hk_366.body: A group of recent souls is developing a cold, highly structured rage.

choices.A: Channel them as unpredictable scouts against other damned souls.
choices.B: Study them to understand that anger and bring it to order.
choices.C: Let their hatred spill into the dreams of isolated mortals.

hk_367.title: Whispering Blades
hk_367.body: The weapons of your torturers begin whispering into the ears of souls.

choices.A: Let them breathe despair and paranoia.
choices.B: Write a protocol for these conscious weapons.
choices.C: Slip those whispers into the minds of human criminals.

hk_368.title: Hall of Canceled Decisions
hk_368.body: A hall shows every major human decision that could have gone another way.

choices.A: Force souls to relive their missed choices forever.
choices.B: Index those decisions to refine your future manipulations.
choices.C: Let living leaders see this hall in nightmares.

hk_369.title: Fair of Failed Miracles
hk_369.body: A fair displays all the miracles that almost happened but failed.

choices.A: Turn it into a constant spectacle to humiliate the faith of souls.
choices.B: Classify each failure by type of interference.
choices.C: Slip the idea of these failed miracles into human sermons.

hk_370.title: Choir of Final Words
hk_370.body: A choir endlessly repeats the last words of millions of mortals.

choices.A: Add a distorted echo that crushes hope.
choices.B: Record the most useful phrases for your archives.
choices.C: Let this choir be heard in certain hospital rooms.

hk_371.title: Demon Tailors
hk_371.body: Demons want to weave cloaks from the illusions of mortals.

choices.A: Let them craft garments that crush souls.
choices.B: Organize these workshops into tightly ranked guilds.
choices.C: Send some of these patterns into human fashion.

hk_372.title: Hall of Forced Confessions
hk_372.body: A hall compels souls to confess everything, even the unspeakable.

choices.A: Throw in the proudest until they crack.
choices.B: Record every confession in a meticulous file.
choices.C: Make these confessions resonate in fragile living people.

hk_373.title: Festival of Dust
hk_373.body: A festival is proposed to celebrate everything that ends in dust in your realm.

choices.A: Encourage this feast of erasure.
choices.B: Structure it as Hell's official calendar.
choices.C: Let this theme inspire despairing human works.

hk_374.title: Masks of Respectability
hk_374.body: Masks give the damned the appearance of honorable people.

choices.A: Force them to wear these masks while knowing what they hide.
choices.B: Distribute these masks according to a very precise order.
choices.C: Bring that same social mask into human elites.

hk_375.title: Clock of Betrayals
hk_375.body: A clock rings every time a betrayal is committed on Earth.

choices.A: Amplify the sound until the damned hear nothing else.
choices.B: Link each tolling to a file in your administration.
choices.C: Make traitors feel a wave of unease with every bell.

hk_376.title: Labyrinth of Files
hk_376.body: A labyrinth of filing cabinets contains the full lives of billions of mortals.

choices.A: Abandon certain souls there until they get lost.
choices.B: Appoint a supreme archivist to organize everything.
choices.C: Let fragments of these files surface in investigations.

hk_377.title: Revolt of the Chains
hk_377.body: The chains themselves seem to want to decide whom to hold.

choices.A: Break them to remind them who rules.
choices.B: Negotiate a form of order with these conscious chains.
choices.C: Symbolically tie these chains to certain human dependencies.

hk_378.title: Great Games of the Abyss
hk_378.body: Your lieutenants want to organize giant games to sort the damned.

choices.A: Let the strongest devour the weakest.
choices.B: Establish rules, teams, and rankings.
choices.C: Bring copies of these games into human entertainment.

hk_379.title: School of Toxic Nostalgia
hk_379.body: A school teaches souls to long for an idealized past that never existed.

choices.A: Make it a central discipline of torture.
choices.B: Assess levels of nostalgia and record them.
choices.C: Inject this poison into human political speeches.

hk_380.title: Port of Red Mists
hk_380.body: A port where red mists constantly bring in new souls is expanding.

choices.A: Let the mist-ships dock without control.
choices.B: Establish flow control according to your priorities.
choices.C: Symbolically link this port to certain coastal places on Earth.

hk_381.title: Infernal Theater Troupe
hk_381.body: A troupe endlessly performs distorted scenes of life for the damned.

choices.A: Encourage the cruelest and most humiliating versions.
choices.B: Structure the plays into well-organized cycles.
choices.C: Let this theater overflow into the dreams of human artists.

hk_382.title: Forced Oaths of Loyalty
hk_382.body: Your scribes propose making every soul swear upon your name.

choices.A: Impose this oath on all under threat.
choices.B: Record every oath in an official register.
choices.C: Make that kind of oath echo in certain earthly sects.

hk_383.title: Shards of Broken Heaven
hk_383.body: Luminous shards fallen from a higher place are found.

choices.A: Trample them and mock them.
choices.B: Store them in a closed, well-labeled display case.
choices.C: Make these shards shimmer in human sacred places.

hk_384.title: Patrol of the Overseers
hk_384.body: Your overseers want broader powers to control every corner.

choices.A: Let them impose total terror.
choices.B: Organize them in a strict hierarchy with regular reports.
choices.C: Project this model of surveillance into human cities.

hk_385.title: Merchants of Counterfeit Comfort
hk_385.body: Demons sell the damned fake comforts in exchange for greater suffering later.

choices.A: Look away as long as it breaks more souls.
choices.B: Tax and regulate this trade within your order.
choices.C: Export this model into certain human markets.

hk_386.title: Reversible River
hk_386.body: A river of souls seems at times to flow upward, at times downward.

choices.A: Let it remain capricious to disturb the damned.
choices.B: Study this phenomenon and integrate it into your plans.
choices.C: Connect this river to human stories of second chances.

hk_387.title: School of Self-Deception
hk_387.body: A school teaches souls to lie to themselves again and again.

choices.A: Make it a central base of psychological torture.
choices.B: Classify the types of lies for your archives.
choices.C: Turn these techniques into a norm in human societies.

hk_388.title: Garden of Frozen Ashes
hk_388.body: In this garden, each flower represents a destroyed hope.

choices.A: Walk optimistic souls through it until they give up.
choices.B: List every flower by the origin of the broken hope.
choices.C: Let this garden appear in the visions of human mystics.

hk_389.title: Spectacle of Repeated Falls
hk_389.body: A show reenacts the fall of certain souls over and over again.

choices.A: Invite those who still believe they are innocent.
choices.B: Synchronize these scenes with your calendar of order.
choices.C: Project these falls as symbols into human media.

hk_390.title: Forges of Pacts
hk_390.body: Special forges create pacts engraved in metal.

choices.A: Strengthen every desperate commitment that way.
choices.B: Number and classify each signed pact.
choices.C: Link these pacts to the most abusive human contracts.

hk_391.title: Awakening of the Statues of Pain
hk_391.body: Statues made of frozen pain begin to move slightly.

choices.A: Use them as terrifying guardians.
choices.B: Study them to understand how suffering evolves.
choices.C: Let their silhouette appear in certain human nightmares.

hk_392.title: Hall of Contagious Regrets
hk_392.body: In this hall, one regret triggers a thousand more.

choices.A: Lock the indecisive inside to break them.
choices.B: Measure the spread of regrets for your order.
choices.C: Create this mechanism in human perfectionists.

hk_393.title: Demon Accountants
hk_393.body: Demons count every tear, every scream, every sigh.

choices.A: Push them toward inhuman efficiency.
choices.B: Integrate their reports into your overall strategy.
choices.C: Spread this obsession with numbers through certain economies.

hk_394.title: Flameless Pyres
hk_394.body: These pyres do not burn the body, but the mind.

choices.A: Bind to them those who cling to their image.
choices.B: Record each invisible wound to control the souls more effectively.
choices.C: Echo these pyres through human social shame.

hk_395.title: Suspended Bridge Over the Void
hk_395.body: A fragile rope bridge links two cliffs of screaming souls.

choices.A: Force the damned to cross it again and again.
choices.B: Set rules of passage to control fear.
choices.C: Use this bridge as a symbol in human crisis visions.

hk_396.title: Library of Excuses
hk_396.body: A library stores every excuse ever spoken to avoid taking responsibility.

choices.A: Make those who spoke them read them back.
choices.B: Classify excuses by effectiveness for your future temptations.
choices.C: Let certain excuses become standard phrases on Earth.

hk_397.title: Soot Meteors
hk_397.body: Meteors of soot fall regularly into your pits.

choices.A: Let them crush souls at random.
choices.B: Plan their falls to reshape certain sectors.
choices.C: Link these dark showers to natural events on Earth.

hk_398.title: Horn of Summoning
hk_398.body: A giant horn can gather all your forces in an instant.

choices.A: Sound it often to assert your presence.
choices.B: Reserve it for the most critical moments.
choices.C: Make mortals feel its sound as a wave of dread.

hk_399.title: Secondary Throne
hk_399.body: Your advisers suggest creating a second throne for delegation.

choices.A: Refuse to share even the smallest fragment of your power.
choices.B: Name a tightly supervised temporary regent.
choices.C: Give that symbolic throne to a figure who will influence mortals.

hk_400.title: Assessment of an Infernal Reign
hk_400.body: Your scribes lay the complete records of your current reign before you.

choices.A: Ignore the numbers and continue in excess.
choices.B: Study every piece of data to optimize your order.
choices.C: Decide to direct more of your efforts toward the world of the living.
